hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState<SortConfig[]>(() => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    const saved = localStorage.getItem('resindb-sort-config-multi');
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    if (saved) {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      try {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        return JSON.parse(saved);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      } catch {

hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    return [];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  });
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  const handleSetSortConfig = useCallback((key: string, multi: boolean = false) => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    setSortConfig((prev) => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      const existingIndex = prev.findIndex((s) => s.key === key);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      let next: SortConfig[];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      if (existingIndex > -1) {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        const existing = prev[existingIndex];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (existing.direction === 'asc') {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          // asc -> desc
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          next = [...prev];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          next[existingIndex] = { ...existing, direction: 'desc' };
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        } else {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          // desc -> off
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          next = prev.filter((_, i) => i !== existingIndex);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      } else {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        // off -> asc
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        const newSort: SortConfig = { key, direction: 'asc' };
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        next = multi ? [...prev, newSort] : [newSort];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      localStorage.setItem('resindb-sort-config-multi', JSON.stringify(next));
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      return next;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    });
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  }, []);

hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  }, [onSelectionChange]);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  // Filter data
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    if (!activeFilters || activeFilters.length === 0) return data;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    return data.filter(product => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      return activeFilters.every(filter => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (filter.type === 'search') {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          const searchLower = filter.label.toLowerCase();
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          if (product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower)) return true;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          if (product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower)) return true;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          const props = product.properties;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          for (const key in props) {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:             if (String(props[key].value).toLowerCase().includes(searchLower)) return true;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          return false;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        return true;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      });
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    });
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  }, [data, activeFilters]);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  // Sort data
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  const sortedData = useMemo(() => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    if (sortConfig.length === 0) {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      return [...filteredData];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    // Pre-compile graph
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    const formulaExecutor = formulaEngine.compileGraph(formulas);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    // Sort logic using priority chain
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    const precalculatedScores = new Map<string, number>();
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    if (sortConfig.some(s => s.key === 'completeness')) {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      filteredData.forEach(p => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        precalculatedScores.set(p.id, calculateCompleteness(p));
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      });
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    return [...filteredData].sort((a, b) => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:       for (const sort of sortConfig) {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:         let aVal: unknown;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:         let bVal: unknown;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts: 
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:         if (sort.key === 'completeness') {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:           aVal = precalculatedScores.get(a.id);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:           bVal = precalculatedScores.get(b.id);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:         } else {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          const col = columns.find(c => c.key === sort.key);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          if (col?.isComputed && col.formulaId) {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:            aVal = formulaExecutor(a)[col.formulaId];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:            bVal = formulaExecutor(b)[col.formulaId];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          } else {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:            aVal = a.properties[sort.key]?.value ?? (a as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[sort.key];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:            bVal = b.properties[sort.key]?.value ?? (b as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[sort.key];
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (aVal === bVal) continue;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        // Handle nulls
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (aVal === undefined || aVal === null) return 1;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (bVal === undefined || bVal === null) return -1;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        const isLow = isLowBest(sort.key);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        const m = sort.direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        const revM = isLow ? -m : m;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (typeof aVal === 'number' && typeof bVal === 'number') {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:          return (aVal - bVal) * revM;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        const sA = String(aVal).toLowerCase();
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        const sB = String(bVal).toLowerCase();
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (sA < sB) return -m;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (sA > sB) return m;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:      return 0;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    });
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  }, [filteredData, sortConfig, columns, formulas]);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  // Selection
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  const toggleSelection = useCallback((id: string) => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    updateSelection(prev => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        const newSet = new Set(prev);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (newSet.has(id)) newSet.delete(id);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        else newSet.add(id);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        return newSet;
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    });
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  }, [updateSelection]);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  const toggleAllSelection = useCallback(() => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    updateSelection(prev => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        if (prev.size === sortedData.length && sortedData.length > 0) {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:            return new Set();
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        } else {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:            return new Set(sortedData.map(item => item.id));
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:        }
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    });
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  }, [sortedData, updateSelection]);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  const clearSelection = useCallback(() => {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    updateSelection(new Set());
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  }, [updateSelection]);
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:  return {
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    sortedData,
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    sortConfig,
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    setSortConfig: handleSetSortConfig,
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    selectedIds,
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    toggleSelection,
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    toggleAllSelection,
hooks/useDataGrid.ts:    clearSelection

hooks/useAppActions.ts:            const updated = await api.update(p);

hooks/useAppActions.ts:        } catch (error) {

hooks/useAppActions.ts:    }, [allProducts, setAllProducts, addToast, t, setShowSidebar]);
hooks/useAppActions.ts:
hooks/useAppActions.ts:    const handleBatchUpdate = useCallback(async (ids: string[], updates: ProductUpdates) => {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:        const previousProducts = [...allProducts];
hooks/useAppActions.ts:        const { _propertyUpdates, ...restUpdates } = updates;
hooks/useAppActions.ts:        
hooks/useAppActions.ts:        setAllProducts(prev => prev.map(p => {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            if (!ids.includes(p.id)) return p;
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            const newProperties = { ...p.properties };
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            if (_propertyUpdates) {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                Object.keys(_propertyUpdates).forEach(key => {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                    const updateVal = _propertyUpdates[key];
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                    
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                    if (updateVal !== null && typeof updateVal === 'object' && 'value' in updateVal) {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                        // It's a PropertyValue object
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                        newProperties[key] = { ...newProperties[key], ...updateVal };
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                    } else if (updateVal !== null && (typeof updateVal === 'string' || typeof updateVal === 'number')) {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                        // It's a simple value
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                        if (newProperties[key]) {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                            newProperties[key] = { ...newProperties[key], value: updateVal };
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                        } else {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                            newProperties[key] = { value: updateVal, unit: '' };
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                        }
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                    }
hooks/useAppActions.ts:                });
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            }
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            return { ...p, ...restUpdates, properties: newProperties };
hooks/useAppActions.ts:        })); 
hooks/useAppActions.ts:        
hooks/useAppActions.ts:        try {
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            await api.batchUpdate(ids, restUpdates); 
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            addToast('success', t('batchUpdateSuccess'));
hooks/useAppActions.ts:            setShowSidebar(true);

hooks/useAppActions.ts:        }
hooks/useAppActions.ts:    }, [allProducts, setAllProducts, addToast, t, setShowSidebar]);
hooks/useAppActions.ts:

hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:import { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:import { Product } from '../types';
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:import { useToasts } from '../contexts/ToastContext';

hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:export function useMahalanobisWorker() {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  const [outlierResults, setOutlierResults] = useState<Record<string, { isOutlier: boolean; distance: number; contributingFeatures: string[] }>>({});
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  const { isCalculating: isDetecting, result, runAnalysis } = useWorker();
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  const { addToast } = useToasts();
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  useEffect(() => {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:    if (result) {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:       const mapped: Record<string, { isOutlier: boolean; distance: number; contributingFeatures: string[] }> = {};
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:       let count = 0;
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:       result.distances.forEach(d => {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:           mapped[d.id] = { isOutlier: d.isOutlier, distance: d.distance, contributingFeatures: [] };
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:           if(d.isOutlier) count++;
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:       });
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:       setOutlierResults(mapped);
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:       if(count > 0) addToast('error', `Identified ${count} anomalous data points using Mahalanobis distance.`);
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:       else addToast('success', "Data distribution conforms to expected structural limits.");
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:    }
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  }, [result, addToast]);
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  const detectOutliers = useCallback((products: Product[], features: string[]) => {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:      if (products.length <= features.length) {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:         addToast("error", "For Mahalanobis detection, the number of records must strictly exceed the number of features.");
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:         return;
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:      }
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:      const dataRecord = products.map(p => {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:          const m = { _id: p.id, name: p.gradeName } as any;
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:          features.forEach(f => {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:              const val = parseFloat(String(p.properties[f]?.value));
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:              m[f] = isNaN(val) ? 0 : val;
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:          });
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:          return m;
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:      });
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:      runAnalysis(dataRecord, features, 0.05); // using 0.05 alpha instead of raw threshold
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  }, [addToast, runAnalysis]);
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  const clearOutliers = useCallback(() => {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:    setOutlierResults({});
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  }, []);
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  return {
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:    outlierResults,
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:    isDetecting,
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:    detectOutliers,
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:    clearOutliers
hooks/useMahalanobis.ts:  };

hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:import type { CopulaMessage, CopulaResponse } from '../lib/copulaWorker';
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:export function useCopulaWorker() {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  const [isCalculating, setIsCalculating] = useState(false);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  const [copulaResult, setCopulaResult] = useState<CopulaResponse['payload'] | null>(null);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  const workerRef = useRef<Worker | null>(null);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  useEffect(() => {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    workerRef.current = new Worker(new URL('../lib/copulaWorker.ts', import.meta.url), {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:      type: 'module'
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    });
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    workerRef.current.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<CopulaResponse>) => {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:      const res = e.data;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:      if (res.type === 'COPULA_RESULT') {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:        setCopulaResult(res.payload || null);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:        setError(null);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:        setIsCalculating(false);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:      } else if (res.type === 'ERROR') {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:        setError(res.error || 'Unknown error');
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:        setIsCalculating(false);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:      }
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    };
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    return () => {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:      workerRef.current?.terminate();
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    };
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  }, []);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  const calculateCopula = useCallback((data: { x: number; y: number }[]) => {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    if (!workerRef.current) return;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    setIsCalculating(true);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    setError(null);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    workerRef.current.postMessage({
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:      type: 'CALCULATE_COPULA',
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:      payload: { data }
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    } as CopulaMessage);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  }, []);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  const getJointFailureProb = useCallback((thresholdX: number, thresholdY: number) => {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    if (!copulaResult) return null;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    const { sortedX, sortedY, grid } = copulaResult;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    // Find u and v for thresholds
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    let uIdx = 0;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    while(uIdx < sortedX.length && sortedX[uIdx] <= thresholdX) uIdx++;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    const u = uIdx / sortedX.length;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    let vIdx = 0;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    while(vIdx < sortedY.length && sortedY[vIdx] <= thresholdY) vIdx++;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    const v = vIdx / sortedY.length;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    // Integrate copula PDF numerically from grid (Riemann sum approximation)
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    // grid is 50x50, step is 1/50 = 0.02
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    // We sum up C_uv * du * dv where u_grid <= u and v_grid <= v
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    let sum = 0;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    const du = 1/50;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    const dv = 1/50;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    for (const point of grid) {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:        if (point.u <= u && point.v <= v) {
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:            sum += point.z * du * dv;
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:        }
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    }
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:    return sum; // Joint probability
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  }, [copulaResult]);
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:  return { isCalculating, copulaResult, error, calculateCopula, getJointFailureProb };
hooks/useCopulaWorker.ts:}

hooks/useDatabase.ts:  // Background Indexing: Warm up the O(1) text search index during idle time to prevent first-keystroke stutter.

hooks/useDatabase.ts:  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {

hooks/useDatabase.ts:    const syntaxFilters: { key: string, operator: string, value: string | number, max?: number }[] = [];

hooks/useDatabase.ts:    let match;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:    while ((match = syntaxRegex.exec(deferredSearchQuery)) !== null) {
hooks/useDatabase.ts:        const [full, label, condition] = match;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:        let key = resolvePropKey(label.trim());

hooks/useDatabase.ts:                key = resolvePropKey(subLabel);

hooks/useDatabase.ts:                    matchedLabel = subLabel;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                    break;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                }

hooks/useDatabase.ts:            const filterStart = match.index + full.lastIndexOf(filterPart);
hooks/useDatabase.ts:            filterMatches.push({ start: filterStart, end: filterStart + filterPart.length });

hooks/useDatabase.ts:

hooks/useDatabase.ts:        // 2. Category fast-bail

hooks/useDatabase.ts:                if (allExpandedSelectedCategoryIds.has(pCats[i])) {

hooks/useDatabase.ts:            let searchTokens = tokens;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:            if (searchTokens === undefined) {
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                const chunks: string[] = [
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                    getLower(product.gradeName),
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                    getLower(product.manufacturer)
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                ];

hooks/useDatabase.ts:                } else {

hooks/useDatabase.ts:                        case '<': match = val < (f.value as number); break;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                        case '>=': match = val >= (f.value as number); break;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                        case '<=': match = val <= (f.value as number); break;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                        case 'range': match = val >= (f.value as number) && val <= (f.max || Infinity); break;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                        case '=': match = val === (f.value as number); break;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                        default: match = true;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                    }
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                }
hooks/useDatabase.ts:                if (!match) return false;
hooks/useDatabase.ts:            }

hooks/useDatabase.ts:

hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:export function useWeibullWorker() {
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  const [isCalculating, setIsCalculating] = useState(false);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  const [weibullResult, setWeibullResult] = useState<WeibullResponse['payload'] | null>(null);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  const workerRef = useRef<Worker | null>(null);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  useEffect(() => {
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    workerRef.current = new Worker(new URL('../lib/weibullWorker.ts', import.meta.url), {
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:      type: 'module'
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    });
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    workerRef.current.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<WeibullResponse>) => {
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:      const res = e.data;
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:      if (res.type === 'WEIBULL_RESULT') {
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:        setWeibullResult(res.payload || null);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:        setError(null);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:        setIsCalculating(false);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:      } else if (res.type === 'ERROR') {
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:        setError(res.error || 'Unknown error');
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:        setIsCalculating(false);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:      }
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    };
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    return () => {
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:      workerRef.current?.terminate();
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    };
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  }, []);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  const calculateWeibull = useCallback((data: number[]) => {
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    if (!workerRef.current) return;
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    setIsCalculating(true);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    setError(null);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    workerRef.current.postMessage({
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:      type: 'CALCULATE_WEIBULL',
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:      payload: { data }
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:    } as WeibullMessage);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  }, []);
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:  return { isCalculating, weibullResult, error, calculateWeibull };
hooks/useWeibullWorker.ts:}

hooks/useColumns.ts:export function useColumns(allProducts: Product[]) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:  const { formulas, addFormula, updateFormula, removeFormula } = useFormulas();
hooks/useColumns.ts:  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<ColumnConfig[]>([]);
hooks/useColumns.ts:  const isInitialized = useRef(false);
hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:  const computedColumns = useMemo(() => {
hooks/useColumns.ts:    return formulas.map(f => ({
hooks/useColumns.ts:      key: f.id,
hooks/useColumns.ts:      label: f.name,

hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:  // Sync columns when formulas change
hooks/useColumns.ts:  useEffect(() => {
hooks/useColumns.ts:    if (isInitialized.current) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:      setColumns(prev => {
hooks/useColumns.ts:        const next = [...prev];
hooks/useColumns.ts:        
hooks/useColumns.ts:        // Add new computed columns
hooks/useColumns.ts:        computedColumns.forEach(cc => {
hooks/useColumns.ts:          if (!next.find(c => c.key === cc.key)) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:            next.push(cc);
hooks/useColumns.ts:          }
hooks/useColumns.ts:        });
hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:        // Update labels/status for existing computed columns

hooks/useColumns.ts:          if (c.isComputed) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:            const found = computedColumns.find(cc => cc.key === c.key);
hooks/useColumns.ts:            if (found) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:                return { ...c, label: found.label };
hooks/useColumns.ts:            }
hooks/useColumns.ts:          }
hooks/useColumns.ts:          return c;
hooks/useColumns.ts:        });
hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:        // Remove deleted computed columns
hooks/useColumns.ts:        return updated.filter(c => !c.isComputed || computedColumns.find(cc => cc.key === c.key));
hooks/useColumns.ts:      });
hooks/useColumns.ts:    }

hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:  // Initial column generation and persistence loading
hooks/useColumns.ts:  useEffect(() => {
hooks/useColumns.ts:    if (allProducts.length > 0 && !isInitialized.current) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:      isInitialized.current = true;
hooks/useColumns.ts:      let baseCols = [...getDynamicColumns(allProducts), ...computedColumns];
hooks/useColumns.ts:      
hooks/useColumns.ts:      const savedVisibility = localStorage.getItem('resindb-visible-columns-v2');
hooks/useColumns.ts:      const savedOrder = localStorage.getItem('resindb-column-order');
hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:      // Apply visibility
hooks/useColumns.ts:      if (savedVisibility) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:        try {
hooks/useColumns.ts:          const visibleKeys = new Set(JSON.parse(savedVisibility));
hooks/useColumns.ts:          baseCols = baseCols.map(c => ({
hooks/useColumns.ts:            ...c,
hooks/useColumns.ts:            visible: c.isSystem || visibleKeys.has(c.key)
hooks/useColumns.ts:          }));
hooks/useColumns.ts:        } catch (e) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:          logger.error('Failed to parse column visibility:', e);
hooks/useColumns.ts:        }
hooks/useColumns.ts:      }
hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:      // Apply order
hooks/useColumns.ts:      if (savedOrder) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:        try {
hooks/useColumns.ts:          const orderKeys = JSON.parse(savedOrder) as string[];
hooks/useColumns.ts:          const orderedCols: ColumnConfig[] = [];
hooks/useColumns.ts:

hooks/useColumns.ts:            const found = baseCols.find(c => c.key === key);
hooks/useColumns.ts:            if (found) orderedCols.push(found);
hooks/useColumns.ts:          });
hooks/useColumns.ts:

hooks/useColumns.ts:            if (!orderKeys.includes(c.key)) orderedCols.push(c);
hooks/useColumns.ts:          });
hooks/useColumns.ts:          
hooks/useColumns.ts:          setColumns(orderedCols);
hooks/useColumns.ts:        } catch (e) {
hooks/useColumns.ts:          logger.error('Failed to parse column order:', e);
hooks/useColumns.ts:          setColumns(baseCols);
hooks/useColumns.ts:        }
hooks/useColumns.ts:      } else {
hooks/useColumns.ts:        setColumns(baseCols);
hooks/useColumns.ts:      }
hooks/useColumns.ts:    }
hooks/useColumns.ts:  }, [allProducts, computedColumns]);
hooks/useColumns.ts:

hooks/useColumns.ts:    if (columns.length > 0) {

hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:  const toggleColumn = useCallback((key: string) => {

hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:  const toggleAllColumns = useCallback((visible: boolean) => {

hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:  const moveColumn = useCallback((fromIndex: number, toIndex: number) => {

hooks/useColumns.ts:      const result = [...prev];

hooks/useColumns.ts:
hooks/useColumns.ts:  const togglePin = useCallback((key: string) => {

hooks/useColumns.ts:  }, []);

hooks/useColumns.ts:  return useMemo(() => ({

hooks/useHistory.ts:) {
hooks/useHistory.ts:  const [history, setHistory] = useState<Omit<HistoryRecord, 'snapshot'>[]>([]);
hooks/useHistory.ts:  const { addToast } = useToasts();
hooks/useHistory.ts:  const workerRef = useRef<Worker | null>(null);
hooks/useHistory.ts:
hooks/useHistory.ts:  useEffect(() => {
hooks/useHistory.ts:    const worker = new Worker(new URL('../lib/historyWorker.ts', import.meta.url), { type: 'module' });
hooks/useHistory.ts:    
hooks/useHistory.ts:    worker.onmessage = async (e: MessageEvent<HistoryWorkerResponse>) => {
hooks/useHistory.ts:      const res = e.data;
hooks/useHistory.ts:      if (res.type === 'HISTORY_UPDATED') {
hooks/useHistory.ts:        setHistory(res.payload.history);
hooks/useHistory.ts:      } else if (res.type === 'SNAPSHOT_DATA') {
hooks/useHistory.ts:        try {
hooks/useHistory.ts:          const snapshotToRestore = res.payload.snapshot;
hooks/useHistory.ts:          
hooks/useHistory.ts:          // Before applying, push a "Undo to current" snapshot just in case it's not the recent actual state
hooks/useHistory.ts:          worker.postMessage({
hooks/useHistory.ts:            type: 'PUSH_SNAPSHOT',
hooks/useHistory.ts:            payload: {
hooks/useHistory.ts:               description: `Undo to: previous state`,
hooks/useHistory.ts:               // using the current array directly (will be structurally cloned in worker)
hooks/useHistory.ts:               snapshot: [...allProducts]
hooks/useHistory.ts:            }
hooks/useHistory.ts:          } as HistoryWorkerMessage);
hooks/useHistory.ts:
hooks/useHistory.ts:          await api.restoreSnapshot(snapshotToRestore);
hooks/useHistory.ts:          setAllProducts(snapshotToRestore);
hooks/useHistory.ts:          addToast('success', `Restored successful!`);
hooks/useHistory.ts:        } catch (e) {
hooks/useHistory.ts:          console.error(e);
hooks/useHistory.ts:          addToast('error', `Failed to restore: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : 'Unknown error'}`);
hooks/useHistory.ts:        }
hooks/useHistory.ts:      } else if (res.type === 'ERROR') {
hooks/useHistory.ts:        console.error("HistoryWorker Error:", res.payload.message);
hooks/useHistory.ts:      }
hooks/useHistory.ts:    };
hooks/useHistory.ts:    
hooks/useHistory.ts:    workerRef.current = worker;
hooks/useHistory.ts:    
hooks/useHistory.ts:    worker.postMessage({ type: 'GET_HISTORY' } as HistoryWorkerMessage);
hooks/useHistory.ts:
hooks/useHistory.ts:    return () => {
hooks/useHistory.ts:      worker.terminate();
hooks/useHistory.ts:    };
hooks/useHistory.ts:  }, [addToast, setAllProducts, allProducts]);
hooks/useHistory.ts:

hooks/useHistory.ts:    if (workerRef.current) {
hooks/useHistory.ts:        // Structured clone automatically deep copies the snapshot array in the background
hooks/useHistory.ts:        workerRef.current.postMessage({
hooks/useHistory.ts:            type: 'PUSH_SNAPSHOT',

lib/carreauWorker.ts:export interface CarreauMessage {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  type: 'FIT_CARREAU';
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    shearRates: number[]; // x
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    viscosities: number[]; // y
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  };
lib/carreauWorker.ts:}
lib/carreauWorker.ts:
lib/carreauWorker.ts:export interface CarreauResponse {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  type: 'CARREAU_FITTED' | 'ERROR';
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    eta0: number;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    lambda: number;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    n: number;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    a: number;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    fittedData: [number, number][]; // [x, y]
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    rSquared: number;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  };
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:}
lib/carreauWorker.ts:
lib/carreauWorker.ts:// eta = eta0 * (1 + (lambda * gamma_dot)^a)^((n - 1) / a)
lib/carreauWorker.ts:function carreauEval(x: number, eta0: number, lambda: number, n: number, a: number) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:   return eta0 * Math.pow(1 + Math.pow(lambda * x, a), (n - 1) / a);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:}
lib/carreauWorker.ts:
lib/carreauWorker.ts:function calculateRSquared(x: number[], y: number[], eta0: number, lambda: number, n: number, a: number) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    let yMean = 0;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < y.length; i++) yMean += y[i];
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    yMean /= y.length;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    let ssTot = 0;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    let ssRes = 0;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < x.length; i++) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        const yPred = carreauEval(x[i], eta0, lambda, n, a);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        ssTot += Math.pow(y[i] - yMean, 2);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        ssRes += Math.pow(y[i] - yPred, 2);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    if (ssTot === 0) return 1;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    return 1 - (ssRes / ssTot);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:}
lib/carreauWorker.ts:
lib/carreauWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<CarreauMessage>) => {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  try {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const { shearRates, viscosities } = e.data.payload;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    if (shearRates.length < 3 || shearRates.length !== viscosities.length) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:       throw new Error("Insufficient data points for fitting.");
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    // Grid search roughly
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    // eta0: roughly max viscosity
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const maxEta = Math.max(...viscosities);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    let bestParams = { eta0: maxEta, lambda: 0.1, n: 0.5, a: 1 };
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    let bestR2 = -Infinity;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    // We'll perform a coarse grid search to find the best starting point
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    // Note: normally we'd use Levenberg-Marquardt, but a dense grid search for 3-4 params can work for UI purposes if bounded.
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const eta0Options = [maxEta, maxEta * 1.5, maxEta * 2];
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const lambdaOptions = [0.001, 0.01, 0.1, 1, 10];
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const nOptions = [0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9];
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const aOptions = [1, 2]; // usually 1 or 2
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    for (const eta0 of eta0Options) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        for (const lambda of lambdaOptions) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            for (const n of nOptions) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:                for (const a of aOptions) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:                    const r2 = calculateRSquared(shearRates, viscosities, eta0, lambda, n, a);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:                    if (r2 > bestR2) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:                        bestR2 = r2;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:                        bestParams = { eta0, lambda, n, a };
lib/carreauWorker.ts:                    }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:                }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    // Gradient Descent fine-tuning (simplified)
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    let { eta0, lambda, n } = bestParams;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const { a } = bestParams;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const lrEta = eta0 * 0.001;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const lrLambda = 0.001;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const lrN = 0.001;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    for (let iter = 0; iter < 1000; iter++) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        let gradEta = 0;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        let gradLambda = 0;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        let gradN = 0;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < shearRates.length; i++) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            const x = shearRates[i];
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            const y = viscosities[i];
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            const base = 1 + Math.pow(lambda * x, a);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            const power = (n - 1) / a;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            const yPred = eta0 * Math.pow(base, power);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            const diff = yPred - y;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            gradEta += diff * Math.pow(base, power);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            gradLambda += diff * eta0 * power * Math.pow(base, power - 1) * a * Math.pow(x, a) * Math.pow(lambda, a - 1);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:            gradN += diff * eta0 * Math.pow(base, power) * Math.log(base) / a;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        eta0 -= lrEta * gradEta / shearRates.length;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        lambda -= lrLambda * gradLambda / shearRates.length;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        n -= lrN * gradN / shearRates.length;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        // Bounds
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        if (eta0 < maxEta * 0.5) eta0 = maxEta * 0.5;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        if (lambda < 0.0001) lambda = 0.0001;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        if (n < 0.01) n = 0.01;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        if (n > 1) n = 1;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const finalR2 = calculateRSquared(shearRates, viscosities, eta0, lambda, n, a);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    // Generate fitted curve data
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const minX = Math.min(...shearRates);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const maxX = Math.max(...shearRates);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const fittedData: [number, number][] = [];
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const steps = 100;
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    // log scale generation
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const logMinX = Math.log10(minX > 0 ? minX : 0.1);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    const logMaxX = Math.log10(maxX);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        const currentLogX = logMinX + (logMaxX - logMinX) * (i / steps);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        const x = Math.pow(10, currentLogX);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        const y = carreauEval(x, eta0, lambda, n, a);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        fittedData.push([x, y]);
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/carreauWorker.ts:      type: 'CARREAU_FITTED',
lib/carreauWorker.ts:      payload: {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:        eta0, lambda, n, a, fittedData, rSquared: finalR2
lib/carreauWorker.ts:      }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    });
lib/carreauWorker.ts:
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/carreauWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR',
lib/carreauWorker.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/carreauWorker.ts:    });
lib/carreauWorker.ts:  }
lib/carreauWorker.ts:};

lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    this.simulateNetworkCondition();

lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    this.simulateNetworkCondition();

lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    }

lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    const headers = ['ID', 'Grade', 'Manufacturer', 'Category', 'Updated'];
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    const allPropKeys = new Set<string>();
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    products.forEach(p => Object.keys(p.properties).forEach(k => allPropKeys.add(k)));
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    const propKeys = Array.from(allPropKeys);
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    const allHeaders = [...headers, ...propKeys].join(',');

lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:          const val = p.properties[k]?.value;
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:          const strVal = String(val ?? '');
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:          return strVal.includes(',') || strVal.includes('"') ? `"${strVal.replace(/"/g, '""')}"` : strVal;
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:      });
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:      return [...basic, ...props].join(',');
lib/adapters/MockProductAdapter.ts:    });

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    try {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      // Renamed to resin-db-v3 to force a reset and ensure the new 300 products are loaded
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const dbPromise = openDB<ResinDB>('resin-db-v3', 1, {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        upgrade(db) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('products')) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            const store = db.createObjectStore('products', {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:              keyPath: 'id',
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            });
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            store.createIndex('by-gradeName', 'gradeName');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            store.createIndex('by-manufacturer', 'manufacturer');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        },
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      });
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const db = await dbPromise;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      // Seed initial data if empty
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const count = await db.count('products');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      if (count === 0) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        const tx = db.transaction('products', 'readwrite');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        for (const product of PRODUCT_CATALOG) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          tx.store.add(product);
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        await tx.done;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      return db;

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    // In actual local deployment, we can set this to 0 or very low
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    // @ts-expect-error - import.meta.env is available in Vite but TS might complain
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const isProd = import.meta.env?.PROD ?? true;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const delay = ms ?? (isProd ? 0 : 50);
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    if (delay <= 0) return;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, delay));

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:  async search(query: string, categoryId: string | null): Promise<Product[]> {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    await this.simulateLatency();
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const db = await this.getDB();
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const allProducts = await db.getAll('products');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase().trim();
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    // Resolve all sub-category IDs if categoryId is provided
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const targetCategoryIds = new Set<string>();
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    if (categoryId) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const findAndAddSubcategories = (id: string, tree: Category[]): boolean => {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        for (const node of tree) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          if (node.id === id) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            const collect = (n: Category) => {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:              targetCategoryIds.add(n.id);
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:              n.children?.forEach(collect);
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            };
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            collect(node);
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            return true;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          if (node.children && findAndAddSubcategories(id, node.children)) return true;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        return false;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      };
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      findAndAddSubcategories(categoryId, CATEGORY_TREE);
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    return allProducts.filter(p => {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const matchesSearch = !lowerQuery || 
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        p.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery) ||
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        p.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery) ||
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        Object.keys(p.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery));
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const matchesCategory = !categoryId || p.categoryIds.some(id => targetCategoryIds.has(id));
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      return matchesSearch && matchesCategory;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    });
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:  }

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    if (!ids.length) return; // Silent return for empty batch

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    for (const id of ids) {

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          Object.entries(_propertyUpdates).forEach(([key, updateVal]) => {

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:                value: updateVal as string | number 
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:              };
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:            }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          });
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        }

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        await tx.store.put({

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const basic = [
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        p.id, 
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        p.gradeName, 
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        p.manufacturer, 
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        p.categoryIds.join('|'), 
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        p.updatedAt

lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const formatCsvValue = (val: unknown) => {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        const s = String(val ?? '');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        if (s.includes(',') || s.includes('"') || s.includes('\n') || s.includes('\r')) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:          return `"${s.replace(/"/g, '""')}"`;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:        return s;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      };
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      const props = propKeys.map(k => formatCsvValue(p.properties[k]?.value));
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      return [...basic.map(formatCsvValue), ...props].join(',');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    });
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const csvContent = [allHeaders, ...rows].join('\n');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    return new Blob(['\uFEFF' + csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:  }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:  async restoreSnapshot(products: Product[]): Promise<void> {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    await this.simulateLatency();
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const db = await this.getDB();
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    const tx = db.transaction('products', 'readwrite');
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    await tx.store.clear();
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    for (const p of products) {
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:      await tx.store.add(p);
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    }
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:    await tx.done;
lib/adapters/IndexedDBProductAdapter.ts:  }

lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:export interface BayesMessage {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:  type: 'RUN_BAYES';
lib/bayesWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    data: Record<string, number>[];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    features: string[];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    target: string;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    maximize: boolean;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    iterations?: number;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:  };
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:export interface BayesResponse {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:  type: 'BAYES_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/bayesWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    historical: { index: number; y: number; y_pred: number; y_std: number }[];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    suggestions: { params: Record<string, number>; mean: number; std: number; ei: number }[];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    convergence: { index: number; currentBest: number }[];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    targetName: string;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    maximize: boolean;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:  };
lib/bayesWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:function erf(x: number): number {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const sign = (x >= 0) ? 1 : -1;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    x = Math.abs(x);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const a1 =  0.254829592;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const a2 = -0.284496736;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const a3 =  1.421413741;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const a4 = -1.453152027;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const a5 =  1.061405429;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const p  =  0.3275911;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const t = 1.0 / (1.0 + p * x);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const y = 1.0 - (((((a5 * t + a4) * t) + a3) * t + a2) * t + a1) * t * Math.exp(-x * x);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    return sign * y;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:function cdf(x: number): number {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    return 0.5 * (1 + erf(x / Math.SQRT2));
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:function pdf(x: number): number {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    return Math.exp(-0.5 * x * x) / Math.sqrt(2 * Math.PI);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:function cholesky(A: number[][], maxJitter = 1.0): number[][] {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const n = A.length;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    let jitter = 1e-9;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    while (jitter < maxJitter) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        let success = true;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const L = Array.from({length: n}, () => new Array(n).fill(0));
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j <= i; j++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                let sum = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                for (let k = 0; k < j; k++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    sum += L[i][k] * L[j][k];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                if (i === j) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    const val = A[i][i] + (jitter === 1e-9 ? 0 : jitter) - sum;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    if (val <= 0) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                        success = false;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                        break;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    L[i][j] = Math.sqrt(val);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                } else {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    L[i][j] = (1.0 / L[j][j]) * (A[i][j] - sum);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            if (!success) break;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        if (success) return L;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        jitter *= 10;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    throw new Error("Kriging Covariance Matrix is not positive definite, too much multicollinearity in data.");
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:function forwardSolve(L: number[][], B: number[]): number[] {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const n = L.length;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const Y = new Array(n).fill(0);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        let sum = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (let j = 0; j < i; j++) sum += L[i][j] * Y[j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        Y[i] = (B[i] - sum) / L[i][i];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    return Y;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:function backwardSolve(L: number[][], Y: number[]): number[] {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const n = L.length;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    const X = new Array(n).fill(0);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        let sum = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (let j = i + 1; j < n; j++) sum += L[j][i] * X[j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        X[i] = (Y[i] - sum) / L[i][i];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    return X;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:function rbf(x1: number[], x2: number[], l: number): number {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    let sum = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < x1.length; i++) sum += Math.pow(x1[i] - x2[i], 2);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    return Math.exp(-0.5 * sum / (l * l));
lib/bayesWorker.ts:}
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<BayesMessage>) => {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    try {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const { data, features, target, maximize, iterations = 10000 } = e.data.payload;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        if (features.length === 0) throw new Error("No features selected for Bayesian Optimization.");
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        if (!target) throw new Error("No target selected.");
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        if (data.length < 3) throw new Error("At least 3 valid data points are required to build GP.");
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const n = data.length;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const d = features.length;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const X: number[][] = [];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const Y: number[] = [];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (const row of data) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const xRow = features.map(f => row[f]);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            X.push(xRow);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            Y.push(row[target]);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        // Normalize X
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const xMin = new Array(d).fill(Infinity);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const xMax = new Array(d).fill(-Infinity);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < d; j++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                if (X[i][j] < xMin[j]) xMin[j] = X[i][j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                if (X[i][j] > xMax[j]) xMax[j] = X[i][j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const X_norm = X.map(row => 
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            row.map((val, j) => {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                const range = xMax[j] - xMin[j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                return range === 0 ? 0 : (val - xMin[j]) / range;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            })
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        );
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        // Standardize Y
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const yMean = Y.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / n;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        let yStd = Math.sqrt(Y.reduce((sum, y) => sum + Math.pow(y - yMean, 2), 0) / n);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        if (yStd === 0) yStd = 1;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const Y_norm = Y.map(y => (y - yMean) / yStd);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        // GP Params
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const l = Math.sqrt(d) * 0.5; // heuristic length scale
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const noise = 1e-4;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        // Build K
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const K = Array.from({length: n}, () => new Array(n).fill(0));
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j <= i; j++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                const val = rbf(X_norm[i], X_norm[j], l);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                K[i][j] = val;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                K[j][i] = val;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            K[i][i] += noise;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const L = cholesky(K);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const alpha = backwardSolve(L, forwardSolve(L, Y_norm));
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const yBestNorm = maximize ? Math.max(...Y_norm) : Math.min(...Y_norm);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        // Random Search for EI
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const suggestions: { params: Record<string, number>; mean: number; std: number; ei: number }[] = [];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < iterations; i++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const xStarNorm = new Array(d).fill(0).map(() => Math.random());
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const kStar = X_norm.map(x => rbf(x, xStarNorm, l));
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            let meanStarNorm = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) meanStarNorm += kStar[j] * alpha[j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const v = forwardSolve(L, kStar);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            let vTv = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            for (let j=0; j<n; j++) vTv += v[j]*v[j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const varStarNorm = Math.max(1e-12, 1.0 - vTv);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const stdStarNorm = Math.sqrt(varStarNorm);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            let ei = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const delta = maximize ? (meanStarNorm - yBestNorm) : (yBestNorm - meanStarNorm);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const z = delta / stdStarNorm;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            if (stdStarNorm > 0) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                ei = delta * cdf(z) + stdStarNorm * pdf(z);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            suggestions.push({
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                params: features.reduce((acc, f, idx) => {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    const range = xMax[idx] - xMin[idx];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    acc[f] = range === 0 ? xMin[idx] : (xStarNorm[idx] * range) + xMin[idx];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                    return acc;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                }, {} as Record<string, number>),
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                mean: meanStarNorm * yStd + yMean,
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                std: stdStarNorm * yStd,
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                ei: ei
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            });
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        suggestions.sort((a, b) => b.ei - a.ei);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const topSuggestions = suggestions.slice(0, 5);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        // Historical points to check self-consistency
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const historical = [];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const kStar = X_norm.map(x => rbf(x, X_norm[i], l));
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            let meanStarNorm = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) meanStarNorm += kStar[j] * alpha[j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const v = forwardSolve(L, kStar);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            let vTv = 0;
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            for (let j=0; j<n; j++) vTv += v[j]*v[j];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            const varStarNorm = Math.max(1e-12, 1.0 - vTv);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            historical.push({
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                index: i + 1,
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                y: Y[i],
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                y_pred: meanStarNorm * yStd + yMean,
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                y_std: Math.sqrt(varStarNorm) * yStd
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            });
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        // sort by Y to make a clean monotonically increasing/decreasing line
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        historical.sort((a, b) => a.y - b.y);
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        // Cumulative max/min convergence path
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        const convergence = [];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        let currentBest = Y[0];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            if (maximize) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                if (Y[i] > currentBest) currentBest = Y[i];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            } else {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                if (Y[i] < currentBest) currentBest = Y[i];
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            convergence.push({ index: i + 1, currentBest });
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            type: 'BAYES_RESULT',
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            payload: {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                historical,
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                suggestions: topSuggestions,
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                convergence,
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                targetName: target,
lib/bayesWorker.ts:                maximize
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        });
lib/bayesWorker.ts:
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    } catch (error) {
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            type: 'ERROR',
lib/bayesWorker.ts:            error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/bayesWorker.ts:        });
lib/bayesWorker.ts:    }
lib/bayesWorker.ts:};
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:export interface ArrheniusMessage {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  type: 'CALCULATE_ARRHENIUS';
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    points: { tempC: number; time: number }[];
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  };
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:}
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:export interface ArrheniusResponse {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  type: 'ARRHENIUS_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    ea: number; // Activation energy kJ/mol
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    lnA: number; // intercept
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    rSquared: number;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    points: { tempC: number; time: number; x: number; y: number }[];
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    equation: { m: number; b: number };
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  };
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:}
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<ArrheniusMessage>) => {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  try {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const { points } = e.data.payload;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    if (points.length < 2) {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      throw new Error("Arrhenius analysis requires at least 2 data points.");
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    }
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const mappedPoints = points.map(p => {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      const tK = p.tempC + 273.15;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      return {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        tempC: p.tempC,
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        time: p.time,
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        x: 1 / tK,
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        y: Math.log(p.time)
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      };
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    });
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const n = mappedPoints.length;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    let sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumXX = 0;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    for (const pt of mappedPoints) {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      sumX += pt.x;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      sumY += pt.y;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      sumXY += pt.x * pt.y;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      sumXX += pt.x * pt.x;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    }
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const denominator = n * sumXX - sumX * sumX;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    if (Math.abs(denominator) < 1e-12) {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:       throw new Error("Invalid data for linear regression (denominator too close to 0).");
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    }
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const m = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / denominator;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const b = (sumY - m * sumX) / n;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    // R squared calculation
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const meanY = sumY / n;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    let ssTot = 0;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    let ssRes = 0;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    for (const pt of mappedPoints) {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:       ssTot += Math.pow(pt.y - meanY, 2);
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:       const predY = m * pt.x + b;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:       ssRes += Math.pow(pt.y - predY, 2);
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    }
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const rSquared = Math.abs(ssTot) > 1e-12 ? Math.max(0, 1 - (ssRes / ssTot)) : 0;
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    // Activation Energy (kJ/mol)
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    // equation: ln(t) = (Ea / R) * (1/T) + ln(A)
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    // slope m = Ea / R
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    // Ea = m * R
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const R = 8.314; // J/(mol*K)
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    const ea = (m * R) / 1000; // converted to kJ/mol
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      type: 'ARRHENIUS_RESULT',
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      payload: {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        ea,
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        lnA: b,
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        rSquared,
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        points: mappedPoints,
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:        equation: { m, b }
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      }
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    } as ArrheniusResponse);
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR',
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:    });
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:  }
lib/arrheniusWorker.ts:};
lib/dataWorker.ts:import { Product, SortConfig, ColumnConfig, FilterItem, FormulaConfig } from '../types';
lib/dataWorker.ts:import { calculateCompleteness, isLowBest } from '../productUtils';
lib/dataWorker.ts:import { FormulaEngine } from './formulaParser';
lib/dataWorker.ts:import { calculateTopsis } from './topsisAnalyzer';
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:const formulaEngine = new FormulaEngine();
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:export type WorkerMessage = 
lib/dataWorker.ts:  | { type: 'INIT_DATA', payload: { allProducts: Product[], formulas: FormulaConfig[], columns: ColumnConfig[] } }
lib/dataWorker.ts:  | { type: 'QUERY', payload: { activeFilters: FilterItem[], sortConfig: SortConfig[], useTopsis?: boolean, detectAnomaliesKey?: string } };
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:export type WorkerResponse = 
lib/dataWorker.ts:  | { type: 'INIT_SUCCESS' }
lib/dataWorker.ts:  | { type: 'QUERY_RESULT', payload: { resultIds: string[], topsisTop3Ids?: string[], outliers?: string[] } }
lib/dataWorker.ts:  | { type: 'ERROR', payload: { message: string } };
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:let data: Product[] = [];
lib/dataWorker.ts:let columns: ColumnConfig[] = [];
lib/dataWorker.ts:let formulas: FormulaConfig[] = [];
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:// The main message handler for the worker
lib/dataWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<WorkerMessage>) => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:  try {
lib/dataWorker.ts:    const msg = e.data;
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:    switch (msg.type) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:      case 'INIT_DATA': {
lib/dataWorker.ts:        data = msg.payload.allProducts;
lib/dataWorker.ts:        formulas = msg.payload.formulas;
lib/dataWorker.ts:        columns = msg.payload.columns;
lib/dataWorker.ts:        
lib/dataWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({ type: 'INIT_SUCCESS' } as WorkerResponse);
lib/dataWorker.ts:        break;
lib/dataWorker.ts:      }
lib/dataWorker.ts:      
lib/dataWorker.ts:      case 'QUERY': {
lib/dataWorker.ts:        const { activeFilters, sortConfig } = msg.payload;
lib/dataWorker.ts:        
lib/dataWorker.ts:        // 1. Filter
lib/dataWorker.ts:        let filteredData = data;
lib/dataWorker.ts:        if (activeFilters && activeFilters.length > 0) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:          filteredData = data.filter(product => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:            return activeFilters.every(filter => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:              if (filter.type === 'search') {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                const searchLower = filter.label.toLowerCase();
lib/dataWorker.ts:                
lib/dataWorker.ts:                if (product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower)) return true;
lib/dataWorker.ts:                if (product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower)) return true;
lib/dataWorker.ts:                
lib/dataWorker.ts:                const props = product.properties;
lib/dataWorker.ts:                for (const key in props) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                   if (String(props[key].value).toLowerCase().includes(searchLower)) return true;
lib/dataWorker.ts:                }
lib/dataWorker.ts:                return false;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              }
lib/dataWorker.ts:              return true;
lib/dataWorker.ts:            });
lib/dataWorker.ts:          });
lib/dataWorker.ts:        }
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:        // 2. Sort
lib/dataWorker.ts:        let sortedData = filteredData;
lib/dataWorker.ts:        const formulaExecutor = formulaEngine.compileGraph(formulas);
lib/dataWorker.ts:        let topsisTop3Ids: string[] = [];
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:        if (msg.payload.useTopsis && filteredData.length > 0) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:           const activeCols = columns.filter(c => c.type === 'number' || c.isComputed);
lib/dataWorker.ts:           const topsisCols = activeCols.map(c => ({
lib/dataWorker.ts:              key: c.key,
lib/dataWorker.ts:              isLowBest: isLowBest(c.key)
lib/dataWorker.ts:           }));
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:           const scores = calculateTopsis(filteredData, topsisCols, (item, key) => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const col = columns.find(c => c.key === key);
lib/dataWorker.ts:              if (col?.isComputed && col.formulaId) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                 return formulaExecutor(item)[col.formulaId] || 0;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              }
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const val = item.properties[key]?.value ?? (item as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
lib/dataWorker.ts:              return typeof val === 'number' ? val : parseFloat(String(val));
lib/dataWorker.ts:           });
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:           sortedData = [...filteredData].sort((a, b) => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const sA = scores.get(a.id) || 0;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const sB = scores.get(b.id) || 0;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              return sB - sA;
lib/dataWorker.ts:           });
lib/dataWorker.ts:           
lib/dataWorker.ts:           topsisTop3Ids = sortedData.slice(0, 3).map(p => p.id);
lib/dataWorker.ts:        } else if (sortConfig.length > 0) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:          // Pre-calculate completeness if needed
lib/dataWorker.ts:          const precalculatedScores = new Map<string, number>();
lib/dataWorker.ts:          if (sortConfig.some(s => s.key === 'completeness')) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:            filteredData.forEach(p => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:              precalculatedScores.set(p.id, calculateCompleteness(p));
lib/dataWorker.ts:            });
lib/dataWorker.ts:          }
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:          sortedData = [...filteredData].sort((a, b) => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:             for (const sort of sortConfig) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:               let aVal: unknown;
lib/dataWorker.ts:               let bVal: unknown;
lib/dataWorker.ts:       
lib/dataWorker.ts:               if (sort.key === 'completeness') {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                 aVal = precalculatedScores.get(a.id);
lib/dataWorker.ts:                 bVal = precalculatedScores.get(b.id);
lib/dataWorker.ts:               } else {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                const col = columns.find(c => c.key === sort.key);
lib/dataWorker.ts:                if (col?.isComputed && col.formulaId) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                  aVal = formulaExecutor(a)[col.formulaId];
lib/dataWorker.ts:                  bVal = formulaExecutor(b)[col.formulaId];
lib/dataWorker.ts:                } else {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                  aVal = a.properties[sort.key]?.value ?? (a as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[sort.key];
lib/dataWorker.ts:                  bVal = b.properties[sort.key]?.value ?? (b as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[sort.key];
lib/dataWorker.ts:                }
lib/dataWorker.ts:              }
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:              if (aVal === bVal) continue;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              
lib/dataWorker.ts:              if (aVal === undefined || aVal === null) return 1;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              if (bVal === undefined || bVal === null) return -1;
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const isLow = isLowBest(sort.key);
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const m = sort.direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const revM = isLow ? -m : m;
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:              if (typeof aVal === 'number' && typeof bVal === 'number') {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                return (aVal - bVal) * revM;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              }
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const sA = String(aVal).toLowerCase();
lib/dataWorker.ts:              const sB = String(bVal).toLowerCase();
lib/dataWorker.ts:              
lib/dataWorker.ts:              if (sA < sB) return -m;
lib/dataWorker.ts:              if (sA > sB) return m;
lib/dataWorker.ts:            }
lib/dataWorker.ts:            return 0;
lib/dataWorker.ts:          });
lib/dataWorker.ts:        }
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:        // 3. Anomaly Detection
lib/dataWorker.ts:        let outliers: string[] = [];
lib/dataWorker.ts:        if (msg.payload.detectAnomaliesKey && filteredData.length > 0) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:          const key = msg.payload.detectAnomaliesKey;
lib/dataWorker.ts:          const vals: { id: string, val: number }[] = [];
lib/dataWorker.ts:          let sum = 0;
lib/dataWorker.ts:          let count = 0;
lib/dataWorker.ts:          
lib/dataWorker.ts:          filteredData.forEach(p => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:             let v: unknown;
lib/dataWorker.ts:             const col = columns.find(c => c.key === key);
lib/dataWorker.ts:             if (col?.isComputed && col.formulaId) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                v = formulaExecutor(p)[col.formulaId];
lib/dataWorker.ts:             } else {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                v = p.properties[key]?.value ?? (p as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
lib/dataWorker.ts:             }
lib/dataWorker.ts:             if (v !== undefined && v !== null && !isNaN(parseFloat(String(v)))) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                const num = parseFloat(String(v));
lib/dataWorker.ts:                vals.push({ id: p.id, val: num });
lib/dataWorker.ts:                sum += num;
lib/dataWorker.ts:                count++;
lib/dataWorker.ts:             }
lib/dataWorker.ts:          });
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:          if (count > 0) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:             const mean = sum / count;
lib/dataWorker.ts:             let sqDiffSum = 0;
lib/dataWorker.ts:             vals.forEach(v => {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                sqDiffSum += Math.pow(v.val - mean, 2);
lib/dataWorker.ts:             });
lib/dataWorker.ts:             const stdDev = Math.sqrt(sqDiffSum / count);
lib/dataWorker.ts:             
lib/dataWorker.ts:             if (stdDev > 0) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:                outliers = vals.filter(v => Math.abs((v.val - mean) / stdDev) > 3).map(v => v.id);
lib/dataWorker.ts:             }
lib/dataWorker.ts:          }
lib/dataWorker.ts:        }
lib/dataWorker.ts:
lib/dataWorker.ts:        // 4. Return IDs
lib/dataWorker.ts:        const resultIds = sortedData.map(p => p.id);
lib/dataWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({ type: 'QUERY_RESULT', payload: { resultIds, topsisTop3Ids, outliers } } as WorkerResponse);
lib/dataWorker.ts:        break;
lib/dataWorker.ts:      }
lib/dataWorker.ts:    }
lib/dataWorker.ts:  } catch (err) {
lib/dataWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({ 
lib/dataWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR', 
lib/dataWorker.ts:      payload: { message: err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown Worker Error' } 
lib/dataWorker.ts:    } as WorkerResponse);
lib/dataWorker.ts:  }
lib/dataWorker.ts:};
lib/wlfWorker.ts:export interface WlfMessage {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  type: 'CALCULATE_WLF';
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    curves: { temp: number; points: { rate: number; visc: number }[] }[];
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    refTemp: number;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    baseDensity?: number;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  };
lib/wlfWorker.ts:}
lib/wlfWorker.ts:
lib/wlfWorker.ts:export interface WlfResponse {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  type: 'WLF_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    c1: number;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    c2: number;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    refTemp: number;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    shiftFactors: { temp: number; aT: number }[];
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    masterCurve: { temp: number; points: { rate: number; visc: number; originalRate: number; originalVisc: number }[] }[];
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  };
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:}
lib/wlfWorker.ts:
lib/wlfWorker.ts:// Helper: Linearly interpolate Y(log visc) at X(log rate)
lib/wlfWorker.ts:function interpolateCurve(logRate: number, logCurvePoints: { x: number; y: number }[]): number | null {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:   if (logCurvePoints.length < 2) return null;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:   if (logRate < logCurvePoints[0].x || logRate > logCurvePoints[logCurvePoints.length - 1].x) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       return null;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:   }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:   for (let i = 0; i < logCurvePoints.length - 1; i++) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const p1 = logCurvePoints[i];
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const p2 = logCurvePoints[i+1];
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       if (logRate >= p1.x && logRate <= p2.x) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           const t = (logRate - p1.x) / (p2.x - p1.x);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           return p1.y + t * (p2.y - p1.y);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:   }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:   return null;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:}
lib/wlfWorker.ts:
lib/wlfWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<WlfMessage>) => {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  try {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    const { curves, refTemp, baseDensity = 1 } = e.data.payload;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    if (curves.length < 2) throw new Error("At least 2 temperature curves required for TTS master curve.");
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // Sort points in each curve by rate just in case
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    const sortedCurves = curves.map(c => ({
lib/wlfWorker.ts:        temp: c.temp,
lib/wlfWorker.ts:        points: [...c.points].sort((a,b) => a.rate - b.rate)
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    }));
lib/wlfWorker.ts:
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // Find ref curve
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    let refCurve = sortedCurves.find(c => c.temp === refTemp);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    if (!refCurve) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       // If exact ref temp not found, take the closest one
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       refCurve = [...sortedCurves].sort((a, b) => Math.abs(a.temp - refTemp) - Math.abs(b.temp - refTemp))[0];
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    const theRefTemp = refCurve.temp;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    const logRefPoints = refCurve.points.map(p => ({ x: Math.log10(p.rate), y: Math.log10(p.visc) }));
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // 1. Numerically find best horizontal shift factor log(aT) for each curve relative to refCurve
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // We assume mainly horizontal shift: log(rate_master) = log(rate) + log(aT)
