lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // Vertical shift is usually bT = rho(T_ref)*T_ref / (rho(T)*T). We assume ≈ 1 for simplicity out of polymers class.
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // So log(visc_master) = log(visc) - log(aT)
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // Which means: we shift the curve by dx = u, dy = -u.
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // We want to find u = log(aT) that minimizes distance to ref curve.
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    const shiftFactors = sortedCurves.map(c => {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       if (c.temp === theRefTemp) return { temp: c.temp, aT: 1, logAT: 0 };
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const logPoints = c.points.map(p => ({ x: Math.log10(p.rate), y: Math.log10(p.visc) }));
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       // Grid search for u in [-10, 10]
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       let bestU = 0;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       let minError = Infinity;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       for (let u = -10; u <= 10; u += 0.05) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           let error = 0;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           let validPoints = 0;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           for (const p of logPoints) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               const shiftedX = p.x + u;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               const shiftedY = p.y - u; // using aT for both freq and visc
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               const refY = interpolateCurve(shiftedX, logRefPoints);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               if (refY !== null) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:                   error += Math.pow(shiftedY - refY, 2);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:                   validPoints++;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           if (validPoints > 1) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               const mse = error / validPoints;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               // Add a tiny penalty to u to prevent unbounded shifting if curves just perfectly parallel but far
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               const penalizedMse = mse + 1e-4 * Math.abs(u);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               if (penalizedMse < minError) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:                   minError = penalizedMse;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:                   bestU = u;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       return { temp: c.temp, aT: Math.pow(10, bestU), logAT: bestU };
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    });
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // 2. Fit WLF: log(aT) = -C1 (T - Tref) / (C2 + T - Tref)
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // => - (T - Tref) / log(aT) = (1/C1) * (T - Tref) + (C2/C1)
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // This is linear standard form: Y = mX + B
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // X = (T - Tref), Y = -(T - Tref) / log(aT)
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // C1 = 1 / m
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // C2 = B / m = B * C1
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    const fitData = [];
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    for (const f of shiftFactors) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       if (f.temp === theRefTemp || Math.abs(f.logAT) < 0.01) continue;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const X = f.temp - theRefTemp;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const Y = -X / f.logAT;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       fitData.push({ X, Y });
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    let c1 = 8.86;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    let c2 = 101.6; // default universal fallback
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    if (fitData.length >= 2) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const n = fitData.length;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       let sumX = 0, sumY = 0;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       for (const d of fitData) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           sumX += d.X;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           sumY += d.Y;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const meanX = sumX / n;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const meanY = sumY / n;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       let ssX = 0;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       let ssXY = 0;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       for (const d of fitData) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           ssX += Math.pow(d.X - meanX, 2);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           ssXY += (d.X - meanX) * (d.Y - meanY);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       if (Math.abs(ssX) > 1e-6) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           const m = ssXY / ssX;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           const b = meanY - m * meanX;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           if (Math.abs(m) > 1e-6) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               c1 = 1 / m;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               c2 = b * c1;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    // 3. Generate Master Curve Data
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    const masterCurve = sortedCurves.map(c => {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const shift = shiftFactors.find(sf => sf.temp === c.temp);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       const aT = shift ? shift.aT : 1;
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       return {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           temp: c.temp,
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           points: c.points.map(p => ({
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               originalRate: p.rate,
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               originalVisc: p.visc,
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               rate: p.rate * aT,
lib/wlfWorker.ts:               visc: p.visc / aT
lib/wlfWorker.ts:           }))
lib/wlfWorker.ts:       };
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    });
lib/wlfWorker.ts:
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/wlfWorker.ts:      type: 'WLF_RESULT',
lib/wlfWorker.ts:      payload: { c1, c2, refTemp: theRefTemp, shiftFactors, masterCurve }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    } as WlfResponse);
lib/wlfWorker.ts:
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/wlfWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR',
lib/wlfWorker.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/wlfWorker.ts:    });
lib/wlfWorker.ts:  }
lib/wlfWorker.ts:};
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:export function calculateTopsis<T extends { id: string }>(
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  data: T[],
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  columns: { key: string; isLowBest: boolean }[],
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  valueExtractor: (item: T, key: string) => number | null
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:): Map<string, number> {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const n = data.length;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  if (n === 0) return new Map();
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const m = columns.length;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  if (m === 0) return new Map(data.map(d => [d.id, 0]));
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  // 1. Extract values & handle nulls
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const rawMatrix: number[][] = [];
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    const row: number[] = [];
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      const val = valueExtractor(data[i], columns[j].key);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      row.push(typeof val === 'number' && !isNaN(val) ? val : 0);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    rawMatrix.push(row);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  // 2. Normalization
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const normMatrix: number[][] = Array.from({ length: n }, () => Array(m).fill(0));
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    const colValues = rawMatrix.map(row => row[j]);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    const maxVal = Math.max(...colValues);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    const minVal = Math.min(...colValues);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    const range = maxVal - minVal;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      if (range === 0) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:        normMatrix[i][j] = 0; // If all same, no variance, weight will be 0 later (or handled)
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      } else {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:        if (columns[j].isLowBest) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:          normMatrix[i][j] = (maxVal - rawMatrix[i][j]) / range;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:        } else {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:          normMatrix[i][j] = (rawMatrix[i][j] - minVal) / range;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:        }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      // Add small epsilon to avoid log(0) in EWM
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      normMatrix[i][j] += 1e-9;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  // 3. Entropy Weight Method
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const weights: number[] = [];
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  let sumWeights = 0;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    let sumCol = 0;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) sumCol += normMatrix[i][j];
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    let entropy = 0;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    const lnN = Math.log(n) || 1; // avoid div by 0 if n=1
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      const p = normMatrix[i][j] / (sumCol || 1);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      if (p > 0) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:        entropy -= (p * Math.log(p)) / lnN;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    const d = 1 - entropy;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    weights.push(d);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    sumWeights += d;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    weights[j] /= (sumWeights || 1);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  // 4. TOPSIS Weighted Matrix & Ideals
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const weightedMatrix: number[][] = Array.from({ length: n }, () => Array(m).fill(0));
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const vPlus: number[] = Array(m).fill(-Infinity);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const vMinus: number[] = Array(m).fill(Infinity);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      const val = normMatrix[i][j] * weights[j];
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      weightedMatrix[i][j] = val;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      if (val > vPlus[j]) vPlus[j] = val;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      if (val < vMinus[j]) vMinus[j] = val;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  // 5. distances & scores
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  const scores = new Map<string, number>();
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    let distPlus = 0;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    let distMinus = 0;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      distPlus += Math.pow(weightedMatrix[i][j] - vPlus[j], 2);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:      distMinus += Math.pow(weightedMatrix[i][j] - vMinus[j], 2);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    distPlus = Math.sqrt(distPlus);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    distMinus = Math.sqrt(distMinus);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    const score = (distPlus + distMinus) === 0 ? 0 : distMinus / (distPlus + distMinus);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:    scores.set(data[i].id, score);
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  }
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:  return scores;
lib/topsisAnalyzer.ts:}
lib/formulaParser.ts:import { Product, FormulaConfig } from "../types";
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:/**
lib/formulaParser.ts: * Fast, sandboxed formula evaluator using Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) for safe topological evaluation.
lib/formulaParser.ts: * Compiles a set of user-defined string expressions into a high-performance execution plan.
lib/formulaParser.ts: */
lib/formulaParser.ts:export class FormulaEngine {
lib/formulaParser.ts:  private static readonly MATH_FUNCS = [
lib/formulaParser.ts:    "abs", "sqrt", "pow", "log", "log10", "exp", "sin", "cos", "tan", "min", "max", "PI",
lib/formulaParser.ts:  ];
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:  /**
lib/formulaParser.ts:   * Extracts dependent property names or computed column names from an expression.
lib/formulaParser.ts:   */
lib/formulaParser.ts:  public extractDependencies(expression: string): string[] {
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const deps = new Set<string>();
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const regex = /(?:props|Props|p|P)\[['"](.+?)['"]\]/gi;
lib/formulaParser.ts:    let match;
lib/formulaParser.ts:    while ((match = regex.exec(expression)) !== null) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      if (match[1]) deps.add(match[1]);
lib/formulaParser.ts:    }
lib/formulaParser.ts:    return Array.from(deps);
lib/formulaParser.ts:  }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:  /**
lib/formulaParser.ts:   * Translates a formula like "Props['Density'] * 10" into a safe internal expression.
lib/formulaParser.ts:   */
lib/formulaParser.ts:  public sanitize(expression: string): string {
lib/formulaParser.ts:    let sanitized = expression.replace(
lib/formulaParser.ts:      /(?:props|Props|p|P)\[['"](.+?)['"]\]/gi,
lib/formulaParser.ts:      (_, pName) => {
lib/formulaParser.ts:        const safePName = pName.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
lib/formulaParser.ts:        return `(__p['${safePName}'] || 0)`;
lib/formulaParser.ts:      },
lib/formulaParser.ts:    );
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    sanitized = sanitized.replace(/[;| &<>{} `$]/g, (match) => {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      return match === " " ? " " : "";
lib/formulaParser.ts:    });
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    FormulaEngine.MATH_FUNCS.forEach((func) => {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      const regex = new RegExp(`\\b${func}\\(`, "g");
lib/formulaParser.ts:      sanitized = sanitized.replace(regex, `Math.${func}(`);
lib/formulaParser.ts:    });
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    return sanitized.replace(/__p/g, "p");
lib/formulaParser.ts:  }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:  /**
lib/formulaParser.ts:   * Compiles the DAG of all formulas to ensure there are no cycles, and returns a topologically sorted list.
lib/formulaParser.ts:   * Throws an error with the cycle path if a cyclic dependency is detected.
lib/formulaParser.ts:   */
lib/formulaParser.ts:  public buildTopologicalOrder(formulas: FormulaConfig[]): FormulaConfig[] {
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const graph = new Map<string, string[]>();
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const formulaNames = new Set(formulas.map(f => f.name));
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const formulaMap = new Map<string, FormulaConfig>();
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    for (const f of formulas) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      formulaMap.set(f.name, f);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      // Depenencies are only those that refer to other formulas
lib/formulaParser.ts:      const deps = this.extractDependencies(f.expression).filter(d => formulaNames.has(d));
lib/formulaParser.ts:      graph.set(f.name, deps);
lib/formulaParser.ts:    }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const visited = new Set<string>();
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const visiting = new Set<string>();
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const order: FormulaConfig[] = [];
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const dfs = (node: string, path: string[]) => {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      if (visiting.has(node)) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:        throw new Error(`Cyclic dependency detected: ${path.join(' -> ')} -> ${node}`);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      }
lib/formulaParser.ts:      if (visited.has(node)) return;
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:      visiting.add(node);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      path.push(node);
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:      const deps = graph.get(node) || [];
lib/formulaParser.ts:      for (const dep of deps) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:        dfs(dep, path);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:      path.pop();
lib/formulaParser.ts:      visiting.delete(node);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      visited.add(node);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      
lib/formulaParser.ts:      const config = formulaMap.get(node);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      if (config) order.push(config);
lib/formulaParser.ts:    };
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    for (const [node] of graph) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      if (!visited.has(node)) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:         dfs(node, []);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      }
lib/formulaParser.ts:    }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    return order;
lib/formulaParser.ts:  }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:  /**
lib/formulaParser.ts:   * Validates a single expression against the current set of formulas to ensure no cycles are created.
lib/formulaParser.ts:   * Returns a string error message if invalid, or null if valid.
lib/formulaParser.ts:   */
lib/formulaParser.ts:  public validate(expression: string, currentName?: string, allFormulas: FormulaConfig[] = []): string | null {
lib/formulaParser.ts:    if (!expression.trim()) return "Expression cannot be empty";
lib/formulaParser.ts:    
lib/formulaParser.ts:    if (expression.includes('constructor') || expression.includes('__proto__') || expression.includes('prototype')) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      return "Security violation: Forbidden keywords detected";
lib/formulaParser.ts:    }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const body = this.sanitize(expression);
lib/formulaParser.ts:    try {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      new Function("p", `return ${body}`);
lib/formulaParser.ts:    } catch (err) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      return err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Invalid syntax";
lib/formulaParser.ts:    }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    if (currentName) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      const tempFormulas = [
lib/formulaParser.ts:        ...allFormulas.filter(f => f.name !== currentName),
lib/formulaParser.ts:        { id: "temp_test_id", name: currentName, expression, unit: "" } as FormulaConfig
lib/formulaParser.ts:      ];
lib/formulaParser.ts:      try {
lib/formulaParser.ts:        this.buildTopologicalOrder(tempFormulas);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      } catch (err) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:        return err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Cyclical dependency error";
lib/formulaParser.ts:      }
lib/formulaParser.ts:    }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    return null;
lib/formulaParser.ts:  }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:  // Caching the execution plan
lib/formulaParser.ts:  private _cachedPlan: {
lib/formulaParser.ts:    formulasRef: FormulaConfig[];
lib/formulaParser.ts:    executor: (product: Product) => Record<string, number>;
lib/formulaParser.ts:  } | null = null;
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:  /**
lib/formulaParser.ts:   * Creates an execution plan for evaluating a product across all compiled formulas.
lib/formulaParser.ts:   */
lib/formulaParser.ts:  public compileGraph(formulas: FormulaConfig[]): (product: Product) => Record<string, number> {
lib/formulaParser.ts:    if (this._cachedPlan && this._cachedPlan.formulasRef === formulas) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      return this._cachedPlan.executor;
lib/formulaParser.ts:    }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    let order: FormulaConfig[] = [];
lib/formulaParser.ts:    try {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      order = this.buildTopologicalOrder(formulas);
lib/formulaParser.ts:    } catch (e) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      console.error(e);
lib/formulaParser.ts:      order = formulas; // Fallback to raw if cyclic exists (though validate should prevent this)
lib/formulaParser.ts:    }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const compiledFns = order.map(f => {
lib/formulaParser.ts:       const body = this.sanitize(f.expression);
lib/formulaParser.ts:       const fn = new Function(
lib/formulaParser.ts:         "p",
lib/formulaParser.ts:         `try { const res = Number(${body}); return Number.isFinite(res) ? res : 0; } catch(e) { return 0; }`
lib/formulaParser.ts:       ) as (p: Record<string, number>) => number;
lib/formulaParser.ts:       return { id: f.id, name: f.name, fn };
lib/formulaParser.ts:    });
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    const executor = (product: Product) => {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      const pDict: Record<string, number> = {};
lib/formulaParser.ts:      // Base properties
lib/formulaParser.ts:      for (const key in product.properties) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:        const val = product.properties[key].value;
lib/formulaParser.ts:        pDict[key] = typeof val === "number" ? val : parseFloat(String(val)) || 0;
lib/formulaParser.ts:      }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:      const results: Record<string, number> = {};
lib/formulaParser.ts:      // Evaluate in topological order
lib/formulaParser.ts:      for (const step of compiledFns) {
lib/formulaParser.ts:         const val = step.fn(pDict);
lib/formulaParser.ts:         pDict[step.name] = val; // Store back in dict for subsequent formulas to consume via Props['name']
lib/formulaParser.ts:         results[step.id] = val;
lib/formulaParser.ts:      }
lib/formulaParser.ts:      return results;
lib/formulaParser.ts:    };
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    this._cachedPlan = {
lib/formulaParser.ts:      formulasRef: formulas,
lib/formulaParser.ts:      executor
lib/formulaParser.ts:    };
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:    return executor;
lib/formulaParser.ts:  }
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:  public clearCache() {
lib/formulaParser.ts:    this._cachedPlan = null;
lib/formulaParser.ts:  }
lib/formulaParser.ts:}
lib/formulaParser.ts:
lib/formulaParser.ts:export const formulaEngine = new FormulaEngine();
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:export type KMeansMessage = {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  type: 'COMPUTE_KMEANS';
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    data: { id: string; values: Record<string, number> }[];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    keys: string[];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    maxK?: number;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  };
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:};
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:export type KMeansResponse = {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  type: 'KMEANS_RESULT';
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    clusters: Record<string, number>; // id -> clusterIndex
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    k: number;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    centroids: number[][];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  };
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:} | {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  type: 'ERROR';
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  payload: { message: string };
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:};
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:// Compute Euclidean distance squared
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:function distSq(a: number[], b: number[]): number {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  let sum = 0;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    sum += (a[i] - b[i]) ** 2;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  return sum;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:}
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<KMeansMessage>) => {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  try {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const { data, keys, maxK = 10 } = e.data.payload;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    if (!data.length || !keys.length) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      self.postMessage({ type: 'KMEANS_RESULT', payload: { clusters: {}, k: 0, centroids: [] } });
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      return;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const m = keys.length;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const n = data.length;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    // Build data matrix and normalize it (Z-score)
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const rawMatrix = data.map(d => keys.map(k => d.values[k] ?? 0));
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const means = new Array(m).fill(0);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const stds = new Array(m).fill(0);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) means[j] += rawMatrix[i][j];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      means[j] /= n;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) stds[j] += (rawMatrix[i][j] - means[j]) ** 2;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      stds[j] = Math.sqrt(stds[j] / n) || 1; // avoid div by 0
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const mat = rawMatrix.map(row => row.map((v, j) => (v - means[j]) / stds[j]));
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    // Run KMeans for k = 2 to Math.min(maxK, Math.floor(n / 2))
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    // We'll use Silhouette score to find the best K
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const maxTestedK = Math.min(maxK, Math.floor(n / 2), 10);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    let bestK = 1;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    let bestClusters: number[] = new Array(n).fill(0);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    let bestScore = -1;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    let bestCentroids: number[][] = [];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    // Simple k-means function
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const runKMeans = (k: number) => {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      // Initialize with k-means++
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      const centroids: number[][] = [];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      centroids.push([...mat[Math.floor(Math.random() * n)]]);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      for (let c = 1; c < k; c++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const dists = mat.map(row => {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          let minDist = Infinity;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          for (const centroid of centroids) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            minDist = Math.min(minDist, distSq(row, centroid));
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          return minDist;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        });
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const sumDist = dists.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        let target = Math.random() * sumDist;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        let chosenIdx = 0;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          target -= dists[i];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          if (target <= 0) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            chosenIdx = i;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            break;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        centroids.push([...mat[chosenIdx]]);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      const assignments = new Array(n).fill(-1);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      let changed = true;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      let iters = 0;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      while (changed && iters < 50) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        changed = false;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const newCentroids = new Array(k).fill(0).map(() => new Array(m).fill(0));
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const counts = new Array(k).fill(0);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          let bestC = -1;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          let minDist = Infinity;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          for (let c = 0; c < k; c++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            const d = distSq(mat[i], centroids[c]);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            if (d < minDist) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:              minDist = d;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:              bestC = c;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          if (assignments[i] !== bestC) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            changed = true;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            assignments[i] = bestC;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) newCentroids[bestC][j] += mat[i][j];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          counts[bestC]++;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        for (let c = 0; c < k; c++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          if (counts[c] > 0) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) centroids[c][j] = newCentroids[c][j] / counts[c];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          } else {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            // Re-init empty cluster
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            centroids[c] = [...mat[Math.floor(Math.random() * n)]];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            changed = true;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        iters++;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      return { assignments, centroids };
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    };
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const calcSilhouette = (assignments: number[], k: number) => {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      if (k < 2) return -1;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      let totalSil = 0;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const c = assignments[i];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        let a = 0, aCount = 0;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const bDists = new Array(k).fill(0);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const bCounts = new Array(k).fill(0);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          if (i === j) continue;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          const d = Math.sqrt(distSq(mat[i], mat[j]));
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          if (assignments[j] === c) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            a += d;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            aCount++;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          } else {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            bDists[assignments[j]] += d;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            bCounts[assignments[j]]++;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        a = aCount > 0 ? a / aCount : 0;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        let b = Infinity;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        for (let otherC = 0; otherC < k; otherC++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          if (otherC !== c && bCounts[otherC] > 0) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:            b = Math.min(b, bDists[otherC] / bCounts[otherC]);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const maxAB = Math.max(a, b);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        let s = 0;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        if (maxAB > 0) s = (b - a) / maxAB;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        totalSil += s;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      return totalSil / n;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    };
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    if (maxTestedK < 2) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      bestClusters = runKMeans(1).assignments;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      bestK = 1;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    } else {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      for (let k = 2; k <= maxTestedK; k++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const { assignments, centroids } = runKMeans(k);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        const score = calcSilhouette(assignments, k);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        if (score > bestScore) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          bestScore = score;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          bestClusters = assignments;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          bestK = k;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:          bestCentroids = centroids;
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:        }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    const clustersRecord: Record<string, number> = {};
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:      clustersRecord[data[i].id] = bestClusters[i];
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({ type: 'KMEANS_RESULT', payload: { clusters: clustersRecord, k: bestK, centroids: bestCentroids } } as KMeansResponse);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({ type: 'ERROR', payload: { message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' } } as KMeansResponse);
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:  }
lib/kmeansWorker.ts:};
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:export interface SpcMessage {
lib/spcWorker.ts:  type: 'CALCULATE_SPC';
lib/spcWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/spcWorker.ts:    data: number[];
lib/spcWorker.ts:    usl: number;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    lsl: number;
lib/spcWorker.ts:  };
lib/spcWorker.ts:}
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:export interface SpcResponse {
lib/spcWorker.ts:  type: 'SPC_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/spcWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/spcWorker.ts:    mean: number;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    sigma: number;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    cp: number;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    cpk: number;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    ppm: number;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    histogram: { x: number; y: number }[];
lib/spcWorker.ts:    normalCurve: { x: number; y: number }[];
lib/spcWorker.ts:    histogramBins: number[];
lib/spcWorker.ts:    status: 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger';
lib/spcWorker.ts:  };
lib/spcWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/spcWorker.ts:}
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:// Error function approximation for normal cumulative distribution function
lib/spcWorker.ts:function erf(x: number) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const sign = (x >= 0) ? 1 : -1;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    x = Math.abs(x);
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const a1 =  0.254829592;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const a2 = -0.284496736;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const a3 =  1.421413741;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const a4 = -1.453152027;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const a5 =  1.061405429;
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const p  =  0.3275911;
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const t = 1.0 / (1.0 + p * x);
lib/spcWorker.ts:    const y = 1.0 - (((((a5 * t + a4) * t) + a3) * t + a2) * t + a1) * t * Math.exp(-x * x);
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:    return sign * y;
lib/spcWorker.ts:}
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:function cdf(x: number, mean: number, sigma: number) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:    return 0.5 * (1 + erf((x - mean) / (Math.sqrt(2) * sigma)));
lib/spcWorker.ts:}
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<SpcMessage>) => {
lib/spcWorker.ts:    try {
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const { data, usl, lsl } = e.data.payload;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        if (data.length < 2) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            throw new Error("Standard deviation requires at least 2 data points.");
lib/spcWorker.ts:        }
lib/spcWorker.ts:        if (usl <= lsl) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            throw new Error("USL must be strictly greater than LSL.");
lib/spcWorker.ts:        }
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const n = data.length;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        let sum = 0;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) sum += data[i];
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const mean = sum / n;
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        let sumSq = 0;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            sumSq += Math.pow(data[i] - mean, 2);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        }
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const sigma = Math.sqrt(sumSq / (n - 1));
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        if (sigma === 0) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            throw new Error("Standard deviation is zero. Data points are identical.");
lib/spcWorker.ts:        }
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const cp = (usl - lsl) / (6 * sigma);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const cpu = (usl - mean) / (3 * sigma);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const cpl = (mean - lsl) / (3 * sigma);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const cpk = Math.min(cpu, cpl);
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        // Calculate PPM (out of spec)
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const probLsl = cdf(lsl, mean, sigma);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const probUsl = 1 - cdf(usl, mean, sigma);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const ppm = (probLsl + probUsl) * 1000000;
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        let status: 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' = 'danger';
lib/spcWorker.ts:        if (cpk >= 1.33) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            status = 'success';
lib/spcWorker.ts:        } else if (cpk >= 1) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            status = 'warning';
lib/spcWorker.ts:        }
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        // Generate histogram
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const minVal = Math.min(...data);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const maxVal = Math.max(...data);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const minData = Math.min(minVal, lsl - sigma * 1.5);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const maxData = Math.max(maxVal, usl + sigma * 1.5);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        
lib/spcWorker.ts:        // Sturges' rule for number of bins
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const k = Math.max(7, Math.ceil(1 + 3.322 * Math.log10(n))); 
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const binWidth = (maxData - minData) / k;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const histogramCounts = new Array(k).fill(0);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            let binIndex = Math.floor((data[i] - minData) / binWidth);
lib/spcWorker.ts:            if (binIndex >= k) binIndex = k - 1;
lib/spcWorker.ts:            else if (binIndex < 0) binIndex = 0;
lib/spcWorker.ts:            histogramCounts[binIndex]++;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        }
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const histogram = [];
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const histogramBins = [];
lib/spcWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            const x = minData + (i + 0.5) * binWidth;
lib/spcWorker.ts:            histogram.push({ x, y: histogramCounts[i] });
lib/spcWorker.ts:            histogramBins.push(x);
lib/spcWorker.ts:        }
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        // Generate normal distribution curve points
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const normalCurve = [];
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const points = 150;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const xStep = (maxData - minData) / points;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        
lib/spcWorker.ts:        // Match histogram scale
lib/spcWorker.ts:        const scaleFactor = n * binWidth;
lib/spcWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i <= points; i++) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:            const x = minData + i * xStep;
lib/spcWorker.ts:            const pdf = (1 / (sigma * Math.sqrt(2 * Math.PI))) * Math.exp(-0.5 * Math.pow((x - mean) / sigma, 2));
lib/spcWorker.ts:            normalCurve.push({ x, y: pdf * scaleFactor });
lib/spcWorker.ts:        }
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/spcWorker.ts:            type: 'SPC_RESULT',
lib/spcWorker.ts:            payload: {
lib/spcWorker.ts:                mean,
lib/spcWorker.ts:                sigma,
lib/spcWorker.ts:                cp,
lib/spcWorker.ts:                cpk,
lib/spcWorker.ts:                ppm,
lib/spcWorker.ts:                histogram,
lib/spcWorker.ts:                normalCurve,
lib/spcWorker.ts:                histogramBins,
lib/spcWorker.ts:                status
lib/spcWorker.ts:            }
lib/spcWorker.ts:        });
lib/spcWorker.ts:
lib/spcWorker.ts:    } catch (e) {
lib/spcWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/spcWorker.ts:            type: 'ERROR',
lib/spcWorker.ts:            error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)
lib/spcWorker.ts:        });
lib/spcWorker.ts:    }
lib/spcWorker.ts:}
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:export interface FeatureImportanceMessage {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  type: 'CALCULATE_IMPORTANCE';
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    data: number[][]; // Each inner array represents a point [f1, f2, ..., target]
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    featureNames: string[];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  };
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:}
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:export interface FeatureImportanceResponse {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  type: 'IMPORTANCE_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    importances: { feature: string; importance: number; positive: boolean }[];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  };
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:}
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:// Helper: Matrix Inverse via Gauss-Jordan
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:function invertMatrix(M: number[][]): number[][] {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  const n = M.length;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  const A = M.map((row, i) => [...row, ...Array.from({length: n}, (_, j) => i === j ? 1 : 0)]);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    let maxRow = i;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let j = i + 1; j < n; j++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      if (Math.abs(A[j][i]) > Math.abs(A[maxRow][i])) maxRow = j;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    if (maxRow !== i) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      const temp = A[i];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      A[i] = A[maxRow];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      A[maxRow] = temp;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const pivot = A[i][i];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    if (Math.abs(pivot) < 1e-12) throw new Error("Matrix is singular, unable to solve.");
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < 2 * n; j++) A[i][j] /= pivot;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      if (i !== j) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:        const factor = A[j][i];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:        for (let k = 0; k < 2 * n; k++) A[j][k] -= factor * A[i][k];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  return A.map(row => row.slice(n));
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:}
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:function mathMultiply(A: number[][], B: number[][]): number[][] {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  return A.map(row => B[0].map((_, j) => row.reduce((sum, val, k) => sum + val * B[k][j], 0)));
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:}
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:function transpose(A: number[][]): number[][] {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  return A[0].map((_, j) => A.map(row => row[j]));
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:}
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<FeatureImportanceMessage>) => {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  try {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const { data, featureNames } = e.data.payload;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    if (data.length === 0) throw new Error("No data provided");
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const numFeatures = featureNames.length;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const numPoints = data.length;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    if (numPoints <= numFeatures + 1) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:       throw new Error("Not enough data points for regression modeling.");
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    // Standardize data to get standardized coefficients (Beta weights)
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const means = new Array(numFeatures + 1).fill(0);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const stds = new Array(numFeatures + 1).fill(0);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < numPoints; i++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      for (let j = 0; j <= numFeatures; j++) means[j] += data[i][j];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j <= numFeatures; j++) means[j] /= numPoints;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < numPoints; i++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:        for (let j = 0; j <= numFeatures; j++) stds[j] += (data[i][j] - means[j])**2;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j <= numFeatures; j++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:       stds[j] = Math.sqrt(stds[j] / numPoints);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:       if (stds[j] < 1e-9) stds[j] = 1; // Prevent div by zero
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const X: number[][] = [];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const Y: number[][] = [];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    // Add L2 Ridge penalty dynamically to diagonal
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const RIDGE_LAMBDA = 0.1;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < numPoints; i++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      const row = [1]; // intercept
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      for (let j = 0; j < numFeatures; j++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:        row.push((data[i][j] - means[j]) / stds[j]);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      X.push(row);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      Y.push([(data[i][numFeatures] - means[numFeatures]) / stds[numFeatures]]);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const XT = transpose(X);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const XTX = mathMultiply(XT, X);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    // Apply Ridge
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for(let i=1; i<XTX.length; i++) XTX[i][i] += RIDGE_LAMBDA;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const XTX_inv = invertMatrix(XTX);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const XTY = mathMultiply(XT, Y);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const Beta = mathMultiply(XTX_inv, XTY);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    const importances = [];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    let totalMagnitude = 0;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    for (let i = 1; i <= numFeatures; i++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:       const w = Beta[i][0];
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:       totalMagnitude += Math.abs(w);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:       importances.push({
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:           feature: featureNames[i - 1],
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:           importance: w,
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:           positive: w >= 0
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:       });
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    if (totalMagnitude > 0) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < numFeatures; i++) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:           importances[i].importance = Math.abs(importances[i].importance) / totalMagnitude;
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:        }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    // Sort by absolute relative importance
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    importances.sort((a, b) => b.importance - a.importance);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      type: 'IMPORTANCE_RESULT',
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      payload: { importances }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    } as FeatureImportanceResponse);
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR',
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:    });
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:  }
lib/featureImportanceWorker.ts:};
lib/historyWorker.ts:import { openDB, DBSchema, IDBPDatabase } from 'idb';
lib/historyWorker.ts:import { Product } from '../types';
lib/historyWorker.ts:import { HistoryRecord } from './adapters/types';
lib/historyWorker.ts:
lib/historyWorker.ts:interface HistoryDB extends DBSchema {
lib/historyWorker.ts:  history: {
lib/historyWorker.ts:    key: string;
lib/historyWorker.ts:    value: HistoryRecord;
lib/historyWorker.ts:    indexes: {
lib/historyWorker.ts:      'by-timestamp': number;
lib/historyWorker.ts:    };
lib/historyWorker.ts:  };
lib/historyWorker.ts:}
lib/historyWorker.ts:
lib/historyWorker.ts:let dbPromise: Promise<IDBPDatabase<HistoryDB>> | null = null;
lib/historyWorker.ts:
lib/historyWorker.ts:async function getDB() {
lib/historyWorker.ts:  if (!dbPromise) {
lib/historyWorker.ts:    dbPromise = openDB<HistoryDB>('resin-history-db', 1, {
lib/historyWorker.ts:      upgrade(db) {
lib/historyWorker.ts:        if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('history')) {
lib/historyWorker.ts:          const store = db.createObjectStore('history', { keyPath: 'id' });
lib/historyWorker.ts:          store.createIndex('by-timestamp', 'timestamp');
lib/historyWorker.ts:        }
lib/historyWorker.ts:      },
lib/historyWorker.ts:    });
lib/historyWorker.ts:  }
lib/historyWorker.ts:  return dbPromise;
lib/historyWorker.ts:}
lib/historyWorker.ts:
lib/historyWorker.ts:export type HistoryWorkerMessage = 
lib/historyWorker.ts:  | { type: 'PUSH_SNAPSHOT', payload: { description: string; snapshot: Product[] } }
lib/historyWorker.ts:  | { type: 'GET_HISTORY' }
lib/historyWorker.ts:  | { type: 'GET_SNAPSHOT', payload: { id: string } };
lib/historyWorker.ts:
lib/historyWorker.ts:export type HistoryWorkerResponse = 
lib/historyWorker.ts:  | { type: 'HISTORY_UPDATED', payload: { history: Omit<HistoryRecord, 'snapshot'>[] } }
lib/historyWorker.ts:  | { type: 'SNAPSHOT_DATA', payload: { id: string; snapshot: Product[] } }
lib/historyWorker.ts:  | { type: 'ERROR', payload: { message: string } };
lib/historyWorker.ts:
lib/historyWorker.ts:self.onmessage = async (e: MessageEvent<HistoryWorkerMessage>) => {
lib/historyWorker.ts:  try {
lib/historyWorker.ts:    const msg = e.data;
lib/historyWorker.ts:    const db = await getDB();
lib/historyWorker.ts:
lib/historyWorker.ts:    if (msg.type === 'PUSH_SNAPSHOT') {
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const newRecord: HistoryRecord = {
lib/historyWorker.ts:          id: self.crypto.randomUUID ? self.crypto.randomUUID() : `hist-${Date.now()}`,
lib/historyWorker.ts:          timestamp: Date.now(),
lib/historyWorker.ts:          description: msg.payload.description,
lib/historyWorker.ts:          snapshot: msg.payload.snapshot, // Structured clone automatically done by postMessage
lib/historyWorker.ts:       };
lib/historyWorker.ts:       
lib/historyWorker.ts:       await db.put('history', newRecord);
lib/historyWorker.ts:       
lib/historyWorker.ts:       // Prune keeping only last 50
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const tx = db.transaction('history', 'readwrite');
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const store = tx.objectStore('history');
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const index = store.index('by-timestamp');
lib/historyWorker.ts:       let cursor = await index.openCursor(null, 'prev');
lib/historyWorker.ts:       let count = 0;
lib/historyWorker.ts:       while (cursor) {
lib/historyWorker.ts:          count++;
lib/historyWorker.ts:          if (count > 50) {
lib/historyWorker.ts:             await cursor.delete();
lib/historyWorker.ts:          }
lib/historyWorker.ts:          cursor = await cursor.continue();
lib/historyWorker.ts:       }
lib/historyWorker.ts:       await tx.done;
lib/historyWorker.ts:
lib/historyWorker.ts:       // Broadcast updated history (without snapshot payload)
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const allRecords = await db.getAllFromIndex('history', 'by-timestamp');
lib/historyWorker.ts:       allRecords.reverse(); // Newest first
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const summary = allRecords.map(r => ({
lib/historyWorker.ts:           id: r.id,
lib/historyWorker.ts:           timestamp: r.timestamp,
lib/historyWorker.ts:           description: r.description
lib/historyWorker.ts:       })) as HistoryRecord[];
lib/historyWorker.ts:       
lib/historyWorker.ts:       self.postMessage({ type: 'HISTORY_UPDATED', payload: { history: summary } } as HistoryWorkerResponse);
lib/historyWorker.ts:    } 
lib/historyWorker.ts:    else if (msg.type === 'GET_HISTORY') {
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const allRecords = await db.getAllFromIndex('history', 'by-timestamp');
lib/historyWorker.ts:       allRecords.reverse();
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const summary = allRecords.map(r => ({
lib/historyWorker.ts:           id: r.id,
lib/historyWorker.ts:           timestamp: r.timestamp,
lib/historyWorker.ts:           description: r.description
lib/historyWorker.ts:       })) as HistoryRecord[];
lib/historyWorker.ts:       self.postMessage({ type: 'HISTORY_UPDATED', payload: { history: summary } } as HistoryWorkerResponse);
lib/historyWorker.ts:    }
lib/historyWorker.ts:    else if (msg.type === 'GET_SNAPSHOT') {
lib/historyWorker.ts:       const record = await db.get('history', msg.payload.id);
lib/historyWorker.ts:       if (record) {
lib/historyWorker.ts:           self.postMessage({ type: 'SNAPSHOT_DATA', payload: { id: record.id, snapshot: record.snapshot } } as HistoryWorkerResponse);
lib/historyWorker.ts:       } else {
lib/historyWorker.ts:           throw new Error('Snapshot not found');
lib/historyWorker.ts:       }
lib/historyWorker.ts:    }
lib/historyWorker.ts:  } catch (err) {
lib/historyWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({ type: 'ERROR', payload: { message: err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error' } } as HistoryWorkerResponse);
lib/historyWorker.ts:  }
lib/historyWorker.ts:};

lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:export interface SimilarityEdge {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  source: string;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  target: string;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  value: number; // the similarity score
lib/similarityWorker.ts:}
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:export interface SimilarityResponse {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  type: 'SIMILARITY_CALCULATED' | 'ERROR';
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    nodes: SimilarityNode[];
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    edges: SimilarityEdge[];
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  };
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:}
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<SimilarityMessage>) => {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  try {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const { products, features, threshold } = e.data.payload;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    if (!products.length || features.length < 2) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:      self.postMessage({ type: 'SIMILARITY_CALCULATED', payload: { nodes: [], edges: [] } });
lib/similarityWorker.ts:      return;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const N = products.length;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const D = features.length;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    // 1. Extract Matrix X
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const X: number[][] = [];
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        const row = [];
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        for (let j = 0; j < D; j++) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            const val = parseFloat(String(products[i].properties?.[features[j]]?.value));
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            row.push(isNaN(val) ? 0 : val);
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        X.push(row);
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    // 2. Z-Score Normalization
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const means = new Array(D).fill(0);
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const stds = new Array(D).fill(0);
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < D; j++) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) means[j] += X[i][j];
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        means[j] /= N;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) stds[j] += Math.pow(X[i][j] - means[j], 2);
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        stds[j] = Math.sqrt(stds[j] / (N > 1 ? N - 1 : 1));
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        if (stds[j] === 0) stds[j] = 1; // avoid divide by zero
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const Z = X.map(row => row.map((val, j) => (val - means[j]) / stds[j]));
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    // 3. Calculate Norms for Cosine Similarity
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const norms = new Array(N).fill(0);
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        let sumSq = 0;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        for (let j = 0; j < D; j++) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            sumSq += Z[i][j] * Z[i][j];
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        norms[i] = Math.sqrt(sumSq);
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    // 4. Compute Cosine Similarity Matrix and build edges
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const edges: SimilarityEdge[] = [];
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    const nodes: SimilarityNode[] = products.map(p => ({
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        id: p.id,
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        name: p.gradeName,
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        category: p.categoryIds[p.categoryIds.length - 1] || 'Unknown',
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        value: 1
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    }));
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        for (let j = i + 1; j < N; j++) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            if (norms[i] === 0 || norms[j] === 0) continue;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            let dotProduct = 0;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            for (let k = 0; k < D; k++) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                dotProduct += Z[i][k] * Z[j][k];
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            const sim = dotProduct / (norms[i] * norms[j]);
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            if (sim >= threshold) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                edges.push({
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                    source: products[i].id,
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                    target: products[j].id,
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                    value: sim
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                });
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                // Increase node value (size) based on degrees
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                nodes[i].value += 1;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:                nodes[j].value += 1;
lib/similarityWorker.ts:            }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:        }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/similarityWorker.ts:      type: 'SIMILARITY_CALCULATED',
lib/similarityWorker.ts:      payload: { nodes, edges }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    });
lib/similarityWorker.ts:
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/similarityWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR',
lib/similarityWorker.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/similarityWorker.ts:    });
lib/similarityWorker.ts:  }
lib/similarityWorker.ts:};
lib/filterUtils.ts:import { Product, FilterGroup, FilterCondition } from "../types";
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:export type ProductPredicate = (product: Product) => boolean;
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:export function compileFilterGroup(
lib/filterUtils.ts:  group: FilterGroup | null,
lib/filterUtils.ts:): ProductPredicate {
lib/filterUtils.ts:  if (!group || !group.conditions || group.conditions.length === 0) {
lib/filterUtils.ts:    return () => true;
lib/filterUtils.ts:  }
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:  const isAnd = group.logic === "AND";
lib/filterUtils.ts:  const predicates: ProductPredicate[] = group.conditions.map((condition) => {
lib/filterUtils.ts:    if ("type" in condition && condition.type === "group") {
lib/filterUtils.ts:      return compileFilterGroup(condition);
lib/filterUtils.ts:    }
lib/filterUtils.ts:    return compileCondition(condition as FilterCondition);
lib/filterUtils.ts:  });
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:  return (product: Product) => {
lib/filterUtils.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < predicates.length; i++) {
lib/filterUtils.ts:      const result = predicates[i](product);
lib/filterUtils.ts:      if (isAnd) {
lib/filterUtils.ts:        if (!result) return false;
lib/filterUtils.ts:      } else {
lib/filterUtils.ts:        if (result) return true;
lib/filterUtils.ts:      }
lib/filterUtils.ts:    }
lib/filterUtils.ts:    return isAnd;
lib/filterUtils.ts:  };
lib/filterUtils.ts:}
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:function compileCondition(condition: FilterCondition): ProductPredicate {
lib/filterUtils.ts:  const { field, operator, value } = condition;
lib/filterUtils.ts:  const condVal = String(value ?? "").toLowerCase();
lib/filterUtils.ts:  const condNum = parseFloat(condVal);
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:  return (product: Product) => {
lib/filterUtils.ts:    let val: string | number | undefined;
lib/filterUtils.ts:    
lib/filterUtils.ts:    // Support top-level fields explicitly
lib/filterUtils.ts:    if (field === "gradeName") val = product.gradeName;
lib/filterUtils.ts:    else if (field === "manufacturer") val = product.manufacturer;
lib/filterUtils.ts:    else if (field === "id") val = product.id;
lib/filterUtils.ts:    else if (field === "manufacturerId") val = product.manufacturerId;
lib/filterUtils.ts:    else if (product.properties) {
lib/filterUtils.ts:      val = product.properties[field]?.value;
lib/filterUtils.ts:    }
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:    const strVal = String(val ?? "").toLowerCase();
lib/filterUtils.ts:    const numVal = typeof val === "number" ? val : parseFloat(strVal);
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:    switch (operator) {
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "contains":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return strVal.includes(condVal);
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "equals":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return strVal === condVal;
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "startsWith":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return strVal.startsWith(condVal);
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "endsWith":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return strVal.endsWith(condVal);
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "gt":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return !isNaN(numVal) && !isNaN(condNum) && numVal > condNum;
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "gte":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return !isNaN(numVal) && !isNaN(condNum) && numVal >= condNum;
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "lt":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return !isNaN(numVal) && !isNaN(condNum) && numVal < condNum;
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "lte":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return !isNaN(numVal) && !isNaN(condNum) && numVal <= condNum;
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "isEmpty":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return val === undefined || val === null || strVal === "";
lib/filterUtils.ts:      case "isNotEmpty":
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return val !== undefined && val !== null && strVal !== "";
lib/filterUtils.ts:      default:
lib/filterUtils.ts:        return true;
lib/filterUtils.ts:    }
lib/filterUtils.ts:  };
lib/filterUtils.ts:}
lib/filterUtils.ts:
lib/filterUtils.ts:// Keep old version for compatibility if needed, but internally uses compile
lib/filterUtils.ts:export function evaluateFilterGroup(
lib/filterUtils.ts:  product: Product,
lib/filterUtils.ts:  group: FilterGroup | null,
lib/filterUtils.ts:): boolean {
lib/filterUtils.ts:  const predicate = compileFilterGroup(group);
lib/filterUtils.ts:  return predicate(product);
lib/filterUtils.ts:}
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:export interface MahalanobisMessage {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:  type: 'CALCULATE_MAHALANOBIS';
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    data: (Record<string, number> & { _id: string, name: string })[];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    features: string[];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    alpha?: number; // e.g. 0.05 or 0.01 for Chi-Square
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:  };
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:}
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:export interface MahalanobisResponse {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:  type: 'MAHALANOBIS_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    distances: { index: number; id: string; name: string; distance: number; isOutlier: boolean }[];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    threshold: number;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    mean: Record<string, number>;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:  };
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:}
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:function invertMatrix(matrix: number[][]): number[][] {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    const n = matrix.length;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    const a = matrix.map(r => [...r]);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    const i = Array.from({length: n}, (_, row) => Array.from({length:n}, (_, col) => row===col ? 1 : 0));
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        let max_idx = j;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        for (let i_row = j + 1; i_row < n; i_row++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            if (Math.abs(a[i_row][j]) > Math.abs(a[max_idx][j])) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                max_idx = i_row;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const temp = a[j];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        a[j] = a[max_idx];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        a[max_idx] = temp;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const tempI = i[j];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        i[j] = i[max_idx];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        i[max_idx] = tempI;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const pivot = a[j][j];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        if (Math.abs(pivot) < 1e-12) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:             throw new Error("协方差矩阵存在严重多重共线性（无法求逆），请减少相关性过高的特征或提供更多不重复样本。");
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        for (let k = 0; k < n; k++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            a[j][k] /= pivot;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            i[j][k] /= pivot;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        for (let i_row = 0; i_row < n; i_row++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            if (i_row !== j) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                const factor = a[i_row][j];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                for (let k = 0; k < n; k++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                    a[i_row][k] -= factor * a[j][k];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                    i[i_row][k] -= factor * i[j][k];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    return i;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:}
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:// Wilson-Hilferty transformation for Chi-Square inverse approximation
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:function getChiSquareThreshold(df: number, a: number): number {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    let Z = 1.64485; // alpha 0.05
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    if (Math.abs(a - 0.05) < 1e-4) Z = 1.64485;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    else if (Math.abs(a - 0.01) < 1e-4) Z = 2.32635;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    else if (Math.abs(a - 0.001) < 1e-4) Z = 3.09023;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    const term1 = 1 - 2 / (9 * df);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    const term2 = Z * Math.sqrt(2 / (9 * df));
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    return df * Math.pow(Math.max(0, term1 + term2), 3);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:}
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<MahalanobisMessage>) => {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    try {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const { data, features, alpha = 0.01 } = e.data.payload;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        if (features.length < 2) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            throw new Error("请至少选择2个特征进行多元异常检测。");
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        if (data.length <= features.length) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            throw new Error(`需要至少 ${features.length + 1} 个有效观察样本以建立全秩协方差矩阵，当前可用样本数: ${data.length}。`);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const n = data.length;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const p = features.length;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        // 1. Calculate Mean
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const mean: number[] = new Array(p).fill(0);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < p; j++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                mean[j] += data[i][features[j]];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        for (let j = 0; j < p; j++) mean[j] /= n;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        // 2. Covariance Matrix
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const cov: number[][] = Array.from({length: p}, () => new Array(p).fill(0));
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < p; j++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                for (let k = 0; k < p; k++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                    cov[j][k] += (data[i][features[j]] - mean[j]) * (data[i][features[k]] - mean[k]);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        for (let j = 0; j < p; j++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            for (let k = 0; k < p; k++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                cov[j][k] /= (n - 1);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                // regularize diagonal
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                if (j === k) cov[j][k] += 1e-8; 
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const invCov = invertMatrix(cov);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const threshold = getChiSquareThreshold(p, alpha);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const distances = [];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            const diff = new Array(p).fill(0);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < p; j++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                diff[j] = data[i][features[j]] - mean[j];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            let distSq = 0; // D^2 (Mahalanobis Distance Squared, follows Chi-Square)
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < p; j++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                let temp = 0;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                for (let k = 0; k < p; k++) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                    temp += invCov[j][k] * diff[k];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                distSq += diff[j] * temp;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            distances.push({
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                index: i + 1,
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                id: data[i]._id,
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                name: data[i].name,
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                distance: distSq,
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                isOutlier: distSq > threshold
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            });
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        const meanObj = features.reduce((acc, f, i) => {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            acc[f] = mean[i];
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            return acc;
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        }, {} as Record<string, number>);
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            type: 'MAHALANOBIS_RESULT',
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            payload: {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                distances,
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                threshold,
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:                mean: meanObj
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        });
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    } catch (e) {
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            type: 'ERROR',
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:            error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:        });
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:    }
lib/mahalanobisWorker.ts:};
lib/weibullWorker.ts:export interface WeibullMessage {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  type: 'CALCULATE_WEIBULL';
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    data: number[];
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  };
lib/weibullWorker.ts:}
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:export interface WeibullResponse {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  type: 'WEIBULL_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    m: number; // Weibull Modulus (Shape)
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    eta: number; // Scale Parameter
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    points: { value: number; x: number; y: number; p: number }[];
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    safeValue95: number; // 95% survival (5% failure)
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    rSquared: number;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  };
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:}
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<WeibullMessage>) => {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  try {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const { data } = e.data.payload;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    if (!data || data.length < 3) {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      throw new Error("Weibull analysis requires at least 3 data points.");
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    }
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    // 1. Sort data
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const sorted = [...data].filter(v => v > 0).sort((a, b) => a - b);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const n = sorted.length;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    if (n < 3) {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      throw new Error("Requires at least 3 positive data points.");
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    }
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const points = [];
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    let sumX = 0;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    let sumY = 0;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    let sumXY = 0;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    let sumXX = 0;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    // 2. Median Rank and Linearization
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      const rank = i + 1;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      const p = (rank - 0.3) / (n + 0.4); // Bernard's Median Rank approximation
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      const value = sorted[i];
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      const lnX = Math.log(value);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      const lnLnY = Math.log(-Math.log(1 - p));
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      points.push({ value, x: lnX, y: lnLnY, p });
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      sumX += lnX;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      sumY += lnLnY;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      sumXY += lnX * lnLnY;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      sumXX += lnX * lnX;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    }
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    // 3. Least Squares Linear Regression
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const meanX = sumX / n;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const meanY = sumY / n;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    let ssX = 0;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    let ssY = 0;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    let ssXY = 0;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    for (const pt of points) {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:        ssX += Math.pow(pt.x - meanX, 2);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:        ssY += Math.pow(pt.y - meanY, 2);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:        ssXY += (pt.x - meanX) * (pt.y - meanY);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    }
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const m = ssXY / ssX;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const intercept = meanY - m * meanX;
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const eta = Math.exp(-intercept / m);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    // R^2 calculation
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const rSquared = Math.pow(ssXY, 2) / (ssX * ssY);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    // 4. Safe limit (5% failure -> 95% reliable)
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    // p = 1 - exp(-(x/eta)^m) => x = eta * (-ln(1-p))^(1/m)
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    const safeValue95 = eta * Math.pow(-Math.log(1 - 0.05), 1 / m);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      type: 'WEIBULL_RESULT',
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      payload: { m, eta, points, safeValue95, rSquared }
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    } as WeibullResponse);
lib/weibullWorker.ts:
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR',
lib/weibullWorker.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/weibullWorker.ts:    });
lib/weibullWorker.ts:  }
lib/weibullWorker.ts:};
lib/pronyWorker.ts:
lib/pronyWorker.ts:export interface PronyMessage {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:  type: 'RUN_PRONY';
lib/pronyWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    data: { omega: number; storage: number; loss: number }[]; // omega: rad/s, storage: MPa, loss: MPa
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    numTerms: number; 
lib/pronyWorker.ts:  };
lib/pronyWorker.ts:}
lib/pronyWorker.ts:
lib/pronyWorker.ts:export interface PronyResponse {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:  type: 'PRONY_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/pronyWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    E_inf: number;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    E_sum: number; // for Abaqus normalisation
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    terms: { tau: number; E: number }[];
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    points: { omega: number; storage: number; loss: number; storage_fit: number; loss_fit: number }[];
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    error_metric: number;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    abaqusCard: string;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:  };
lib/pronyWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:}
lib/pronyWorker.ts:
lib/pronyWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<PronyMessage>) => {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:    try {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const { data, numTerms } = e.data.payload;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        if (data.length < 3) throw new Error("At least 3 data points required.");
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        // Sort data by omega
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        data.sort((a,b) => a.omega - b.omega);
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const M = data.length;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const minOmega = Math.max(1e-12, Math.min(...data.map(d=>d.omega)));
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const maxOmega = Math.max(...data.map(d=>d.omega));
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const minTau = 1 / maxOmega;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const maxTau = 1 / minOmega;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const tau = [];
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        if (numTerms === 1) {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            tau.push(Math.sqrt(minTau * maxTau));
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        } else {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            const logMin = Math.log10(minTau);
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            const logMax = Math.log10(maxTau);
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            const step = (logMax - logMin) / (numTerms - 1);
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            for (let i=0; i<numTerms; i++) {
lib/pronyWorker.ts:                tau.push(Math.pow(10, logMin + i * step));
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            }
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        }
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const b = new Float64Array(2 * M);
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        for(let j=0; j<M; j++){
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            b[j] = data[j].storage;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            b[j+M] = data[j].loss;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        }
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const N = numTerms + 1; 
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const A = new Array(2*M).fill(0).map(()=>new Float64Array(N));
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        for(let j=0; j<M; j++){
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            const w = data[j].omega;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            A[j][0] = 1;  // E_infinity constant contribution to Storage
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            A[j+M][0] = 0; // E_infinity has 0 contribution to Loss
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            for(let i=0; i<numTerms; i++){
lib/pronyWorker.ts:                const t = tau[i];
lib/pronyWorker.ts:                const wt = w * t;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:                const wt2 = wt * wt;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:                const denom = 1 + wt2;
lib/pronyWorker.ts:                A[j][1+i] = wt2 / denom; // Storage coefficient
lib/pronyWorker.ts:                A[j+M][1+i] = wt / denom; // Loss coefficient
lib/pronyWorker.ts:            }
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        }
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const x = new Float64Array(N); 
lib/pronyWorker.ts:        const maxE = Math.max(...data.map(d => d.storage));
