lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:export interface MooTarget {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    name: string;
lib/mooWorker.ts:    maximize: boolean;
lib/mooWorker.ts:}
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:export interface MooMessage {
lib/mooWorker.ts:  type: 'RUN_MOO';
lib/mooWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    data: Record<string, number>[];
lib/mooWorker.ts:    features: string[];
lib/mooWorker.ts:    targets: MooTarget[];
lib/mooWorker.ts:    iterations?: number;
lib/mooWorker.ts:  };
lib/mooWorker.ts:}
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:export interface MooResponse {
lib/mooWorker.ts:  type: 'MOO_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/mooWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    paretoFront: { params: Record<string, number>; means: Record<string, number>; stds: Record<string, number> }[];
lib/mooWorker.ts:    evaluatedCandidates: { params: Record<string, number>; means: Record<string, number> }[];
lib/mooWorker.ts:    historical: Record<string, number>[];
lib/mooWorker.ts:    targets: MooTarget[];
lib/mooWorker.ts:  };
lib/mooWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/mooWorker.ts:}
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:// Simple RBF, Cholesky, etc...
lib/mooWorker.ts:// To avoid duplication and complexity, we can re-implement slightly simplified GP here for MOO.
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:function cholesky(A: number[][], maxJitter = 1.0): number[][] {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    const n = A.length;
lib/mooWorker.ts:    let jitter = 1e-9;
lib/mooWorker.ts:    
lib/mooWorker.ts:    while (jitter < maxJitter) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:        let success = true;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const L = Array.from({length: n}, () => new Array(n).fill(0));
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j <= i; j++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                let sum = 0;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                for (let k = 0; k < j; k++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                    sum += L[i][k] * L[j][k];
lib/mooWorker.ts:                }
lib/mooWorker.ts:                if (i === j) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                    const val = A[i][i] + (jitter === 1e-9 ? 0 : jitter) - sum;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                    if (val <= 0) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                        success = false;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                        break;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                    }
lib/mooWorker.ts:                    L[i][j] = Math.sqrt(val);
lib/mooWorker.ts:                } else {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                    L[i][j] = (1.0 / L[j][j]) * (A[i][j] - sum);
lib/mooWorker.ts:                }
lib/mooWorker.ts:            }
lib/mooWorker.ts:            if (!success) break;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        }
lib/mooWorker.ts:        if (success) return L;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        jitter *= 10;
lib/mooWorker.ts:    }
lib/mooWorker.ts:    throw new Error("Kriging Covariance Matrix is not positive definite.");
lib/mooWorker.ts:}
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:function forwardSolve(L: number[][], B: number[]): number[] {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    const n = L.length;
lib/mooWorker.ts:    const Y = new Array(n).fill(0);
lib/mooWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:        let sum = 0;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (let j = 0; j < i; j++) sum += L[i][j] * Y[j];
lib/mooWorker.ts:        Y[i] = (B[i] - sum) / L[i][i];
lib/mooWorker.ts:    }
lib/mooWorker.ts:    return Y;
lib/mooWorker.ts:}
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:function backwardSolve(L: number[][], Y: number[]): number[] {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    const n = L.length;
lib/mooWorker.ts:    const X = new Array(n).fill(0);
lib/mooWorker.ts:    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:        let sum = 0;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (let j = i + 1; j < n; j++) sum += L[j][i] * X[j];
lib/mooWorker.ts:        X[i] = (Y[i] - sum) / L[i][i];
lib/mooWorker.ts:    }
lib/mooWorker.ts:    return X;
lib/mooWorker.ts:}
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:function rbf(x1: number[], x2: number[], l: number): number {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    let sum = 0;
lib/mooWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < x1.length; i++) sum += Math.pow(x1[i] - x2[i], 2);
lib/mooWorker.ts:    return Math.exp(-0.5 * sum / (l * l));
lib/mooWorker.ts:}
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:function isParetoDominating(a: Record<string, number>, b: Record<string, number>, targets: MooTarget[]): boolean {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    // Returns true if 'a' dominates 'b'
lib/mooWorker.ts:    let strictlyBetter = false;
lib/mooWorker.ts:    for (const t of targets) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const valA = a[t.name];
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const valB = b[t.name];
lib/mooWorker.ts:        if (t.maximize) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            if (valA < valB) return false; // a is worse in at least one target
lib/mooWorker.ts:            if (valA > valB) strictlyBetter = true;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        } else {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            if (valA > valB) return false;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            if (valA < valB) strictlyBetter = true;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        }
lib/mooWorker.ts:    }
lib/mooWorker.ts:    return strictlyBetter;
lib/mooWorker.ts:}
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<MooMessage>) => {
lib/mooWorker.ts:    try {
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const { data, features, targets, iterations = 10000 } = e.data.payload;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        if (features.length === 0) throw new Error("No features selected.");
lib/mooWorker.ts:        if (targets.length < 2) throw new Error("At least 2 targets required for MOO.");
lib/mooWorker.ts:        if (data.length < 3) throw new Error("At least 3 valid data points are required.");
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const n = data.length;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const d = features.length;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const X: number[][] = [];
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (const row of data) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            X.push(features.map(f => row[f]));
lib/mooWorker.ts:        }
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        // Normalize X
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const xMin = new Array(d).fill(Infinity);
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const xMax = new Array(d).fill(-Infinity);
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < d; j++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                if (X[i][j] < xMin[j]) xMin[j] = X[i][j];
lib/mooWorker.ts:                if (X[i][j] > xMax[j]) xMax[j] = X[i][j];
lib/mooWorker.ts:            }
lib/mooWorker.ts:        }
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const X_norm = X.map(row => 
lib/mooWorker.ts:            row.map((val, j) => {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                const range = xMax[j] - xMin[j];
lib/mooWorker.ts:                return range === 0 ? 0 : (val - xMin[j]) / range;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            })
lib/mooWorker.ts:        );
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:        // GP Models for each target
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const l = Math.sqrt(d) * 0.5; // heuristic length scale
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const noise = 1e-4;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const K = Array.from({length: n}, () => new Array(n).fill(0));
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j <= i; j++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                const val = rbf(X_norm[i], X_norm[j], l);
lib/mooWorker.ts:                K[i][j] = val;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                K[j][i] = val;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            }
lib/mooWorker.ts:            K[i][i] += noise;
lib/mooWorker.ts:        }
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const L = cholesky(K);
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const gps = targets.map(t => {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const Y = data.map(row => row[t.name]);
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const yMean = Y.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / n;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            let yStd = Math.sqrt(Y.reduce((sum, y) => sum + Math.pow(y - yMean, 2), 0) / n);
lib/mooWorker.ts:            if (yStd === 0) yStd = 1;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const Y_norm = Y.map(y => (y - yMean) / yStd);
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const alpha = backwardSolve(L, forwardSolve(L, Y_norm));
lib/mooWorker.ts:            return { name: t.name, maximize: t.maximize, yMean, yStd, alpha };
lib/mooWorker.ts:        });
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        // Generate Candidates and predict
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const candidates: { params: Record<string, number>; means: Record<string, number>; stds: Record<string, number> }[] = [];
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < iterations; i++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const xStarNorm = new Array(d).fill(0).map(() => Math.random());
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const kStar = X_norm.map(x => rbf(x, xStarNorm, l));
lib/mooWorker.ts:            
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const v = forwardSolve(L, kStar);
lib/mooWorker.ts:            let vTv = 0;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            for (let j=0; j<n; j++) vTv += v[j]*v[j];
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const varStarNorm = Math.max(1e-12, 1.0 - vTv);
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const stdStarNorm = Math.sqrt(varStarNorm);
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const means: Record<string, number> = {};
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const stds: Record<string, number> = {};
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:            for (const gp of gps) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                let meanStarNorm = 0;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) meanStarNorm += kStar[j] * gp.alpha[j];
lib/mooWorker.ts:                
lib/mooWorker.ts:                means[gp.name] = meanStarNorm * gp.yStd + gp.yMean;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                stds[gp.name] = stdStarNorm * gp.yStd;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            }
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const params = features.reduce((acc, f, idx) => {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                const range = xMax[idx] - xMin[idx];
lib/mooWorker.ts:                acc[f] = range === 0 ? xMin[idx] : (xStarNorm[idx] * range) + xMin[idx];
lib/mooWorker.ts:                return acc;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            }, {} as Record<string, number>);
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:            candidates.push({ params, means, stds });
lib/mooWorker.ts:        }
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        // Extract Pareto Front among candidates
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const paretoFront: typeof candidates = [];
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const c = candidates[i];
lib/mooWorker.ts:            let isDominated = false;
lib/mooWorker.ts:            for (let j = 0; j < candidates.length; j++) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                if (i !== j) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                    if (isParetoDominating(candidates[j].means, c.means, targets)) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                        isDominated = true;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                        break;
lib/mooWorker.ts:                    }
lib/mooWorker.ts:                }
lib/mooWorker.ts:            }
lib/mooWorker.ts:            if (!isDominated) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                paretoFront.push(c);
lib/mooWorker.ts:            }
lib/mooWorker.ts:        }
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:        // To bound visual output, maybe sample evaluated candidates
lib/mooWorker.ts:        // We'll just return a random subset of 1000 evaluated candidates so the scatter plot is not overwhelmed.
lib/mooWorker.ts:        // We ensure all pareto front points are returned in paretoFront
lib/mooWorker.ts:        
lib/mooWorker.ts:        // Randomly shuffle candidates
lib/mooWorker.ts:        for (let i = candidates.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:            const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
lib/mooWorker.ts:            [candidates[i], candidates[j]] = [candidates[j], candidates[i]];
lib/mooWorker.ts:        }
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:        const sampledCandidates = candidates.slice(0, 1000);
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/mooWorker.ts:            type: 'MOO_RESULT',
lib/mooWorker.ts:            payload: {
lib/mooWorker.ts:                paretoFront,
lib/mooWorker.ts:                evaluatedCandidates: sampledCandidates,
lib/mooWorker.ts:                historical: data,
lib/mooWorker.ts:                targets: targets
lib/mooWorker.ts:            }
lib/mooWorker.ts:        });
lib/mooWorker.ts:
lib/mooWorker.ts:    } catch (error) {
lib/mooWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/mooWorker.ts:            type: 'ERROR',
lib/mooWorker.ts:            error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/mooWorker.ts:        });
lib/mooWorker.ts:    }
lib/mooWorker.ts:};
lib/logger.ts:type LogLevel = "info" | "warn" | "error" | "debug";
lib/logger.ts:
lib/logger.ts:class Logger {
lib/logger.ts:  // @ts-expect-error - import.meta.env is available in Vite
lib/logger.ts:  private isDev = import.meta.env.DEV;
lib/logger.ts:
lib/logger.ts:  private log(level: LogLevel, ...args: unknown[]) {
lib/logger.ts:    const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
lib/logger.ts:    const style = {
lib/logger.ts:      info: "color: #3b82f6; font-weight: bold;",
lib/logger.ts:      warn: "color: #f59e0b; font-weight: bold;",
lib/logger.ts:      error: "color: #ef4444; font-weight: bold;",
lib/logger.ts:      debug: "color: #8b5cf6; font-weight: bold;",
lib/logger.ts:    };
lib/logger.ts:
lib/logger.ts:    if (this.isDev || level === "error") {
lib/logger.ts:      console.log(
lib/logger.ts:        `%c[${level.toUpperCase()}] %c[${timestamp}]`,
lib/logger.ts:        style[level],
lib/logger.ts:        "color: gray; font-size: 10px;",
lib/logger.ts:        ...args,
lib/logger.ts:      );
lib/logger.ts:    }
lib/logger.ts:
lib/logger.ts:    // In production, we could send logs to an external service here
lib/logger.ts:  }
lib/logger.ts:
lib/logger.ts:  info(...args: unknown[]) {
lib/logger.ts:    this.log("info", ...args);
lib/logger.ts:  }
lib/logger.ts:  warn(...args: unknown[]) {
lib/logger.ts:    this.log("warn", ...args);
lib/logger.ts:  }
lib/logger.ts:  error(...args: unknown[]) {
lib/logger.ts:    this.log("error", ...args);
lib/logger.ts:  }
lib/logger.ts:  debug(...args: unknown[]) {
lib/logger.ts:    this.log("debug", ...args);
lib/logger.ts:  }
lib/logger.ts:}
lib/logger.ts:
lib/logger.ts:export const logger = new Logger();
lib/copulaWorker.ts:export interface CopulaMessage {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  type: 'CALCULATE_COPULA';
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    data: { x: number; y: number }[];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    gridSize?: number;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  };
lib/copulaWorker.ts:}
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:export interface CopulaResponse {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  type: 'COPULA_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    rho: number;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    sortedX: number[];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    sortedY: number[];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    grid: { u: number; v: number; z: number }[];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    minX: number;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    maxX: number;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    minY: number;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    maxY: number;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  };
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:}
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:function norminv(p: number): number {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    if (p <= 0) return -5;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    if (p >= 1) return 5;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const a1 = -3.969683028665376e+01;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const a2 = 2.209460984245205e+02;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const a3 = -2.759285104469687e+02;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const a4 = 1.383577518672690e+02;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const a5 = -3.066479806614716e+01;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const a6 = 2.506628277459239e+00;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const b1 = -5.447609879822406e+01;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const b2 = 1.615858368580409e+02;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const b3 = -1.556989798598866e+02;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const b4 = 6.680131188771972e+01;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const b5 = -1.328068155288572e+01;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const c1 = -7.784894002430293e-03;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const c2 = -3.223964580411365e-01;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const c3 = -2.400758277161838e+00;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const c4 = -2.549732539343734e+00;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const c5 = 4.374664141464968e+00;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const c6 = 2.938163982698783e+00;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const d1 = 7.784695709041462e-03;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const d2 = 3.224671290700398e-01;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const d3 = 2.445134137142996e+00;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const d4 = 3.754408661907416e+00;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const p_low = 0.02425;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const p_high = 1 - p_low;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    let q, r, z;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    if (p < p_low) {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        q = Math.sqrt(-2 * Math.log(p));
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        z = (((((c1 * q + c2) * q + c3) * q + c4) * q + c5) * q + c6) /
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            ((((d1 * q + d2) * q + d3) * q + d4) * q + 1);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    } else if (p <= p_high) {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        q = p - 0.5;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        r = q * q;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        z = (((((a1 * r + a2) * r + a3) * r + a4) * r + a5) * r + a6) * q /
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            (((((b1 * r + b2) * r + b3) * r + b4) * r + b5) * r + 1);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    } else {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        q = Math.sqrt(-2 * Math.log(1 - p));
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        z = -(((((c1 * q + c2) * q + c3) * q + c4) * q + c5) * q + c6) /
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            ((((d1 * q + d2) * q + d3) * q + d4) * q + 1);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    }
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    return z;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:}
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:function getRanks(values: number[]) {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const indexed = values.map((v, i) => ({v, i}));
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    indexed.sort((a, b) => a.v - b.v);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const ranks = new Array(values.length);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < indexed.length; i++) {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        ranks[indexed[i].i] = i + 1;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    }
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    return ranks;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:}
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<CopulaMessage>) => {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  try {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const { data, gridSize = 50 } = e.data.payload;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const n = data.length;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    if (n < 5) throw new Error("Requires at least 5 points for Copula estimation.");
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const xVals = data.map(d => d.x);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const yVals = data.map(d => d.y);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    // For joint CDF calculations
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const sortedX = [...xVals].sort((a,b) => a-b);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const sortedY = [...yVals].sort((a,b) => a-b);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const rankX = getRanks(xVals);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const rankY = getRanks(yVals);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    let sumZ1Z2 = 0;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    let sumZ1Sq = 0;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    let sumZ2Sq = 0;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        const u = rankX[i] / (n + 1);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        const v = rankY[i] / (n + 1);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        const z1 = norminv(u);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        const z2 = norminv(v);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        sumZ1Z2 += z1 * z2;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        sumZ1Sq += z1 * z1;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        sumZ2Sq += z2 * z2;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    }
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    let rho = sumZ1Z2 / Math.sqrt(sumZ1Sq * sumZ2Sq);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    if (rho > 0.99) rho = 0.99;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    if (rho < -0.99) rho = -0.99;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const grid = [];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    for (let i = 1; i < gridSize; i++) {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        const u = i / gridSize;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        const z1 = norminv(u);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        const z1Sq = z1 * z1;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        for (let j = 1; j < gridSize; j++) {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            const v = j / gridSize;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            const z2 = norminv(v);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            const z2Sq = z2 * z2;
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            // Gaussian Copula PDF
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            const exponent = - (rho * rho * (z1Sq + z2Sq) - 2 * rho * z1 * z2) / (2 * (1 - rho * rho));
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            const c_uv = (1 / Math.sqrt(1 - rho * rho)) * Math.exp(exponent);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            
lib/copulaWorker.ts:            grid.push({ u, v, z: c_uv });
lib/copulaWorker.ts:        }
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    }
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const minX = sortedX[0];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const maxX = sortedX[n-1];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const minY = sortedY[0];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    const maxY = sortedY[n-1];
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/copulaWorker.ts:      type: 'COPULA_RESULT',
lib/copulaWorker.ts:      payload: { rho, sortedX, sortedY, grid, minX, maxX, minY, maxY }
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    } as CopulaResponse);
lib/copulaWorker.ts:
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/copulaWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR',
lib/copulaWorker.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/copulaWorker.ts:    });
lib/copulaWorker.ts:  }
lib/copulaWorker.ts:};
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:export interface KineticsMessage {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:  type: 'RUN_KINETICS';
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    data: { beta: number; tp: number }[]; // beta: heating rate (K/min), tp: peak temp (Celsius)
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    isoTemp: number; // Isothermal curing temperature (Celsius) for prediction
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:  };
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:}
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:export interface KineticsResponse {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:  type: 'KINETICS_RESULT' | 'ERROR';
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    E: number; // Activation Energy (kJ/mol)
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    A: number; // Pre-exponential factor (min^-1)
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    r2: number; // R-squared
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    points: { x: number; y: number }[]; // 1/Tp (1/K) vs ln(beta/Tp^2)
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    line: { x: number; y: number }[]; // fitted line points
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    isoCurve: { time: number; alpha: number }[]; // Predicted conversion curve
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    equation: string;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:  };
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:}
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<KineticsMessage>) => {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    try {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const { data, isoTemp } = e.data.payload;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        if (!data || data.length < 3) {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            throw new Error("Kissinger fitting requires at least 3 heating rates (data points).");
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const R = 8.314; // J/(mol*K)
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const X: number[] = [];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const Y: number[] = [];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const points = [];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        for (const row of data) {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            if (row.beta <= 0) throw new Error("Heating rate must be strictly positive.");
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            const tK = row.tp + 273.15; // C to K
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            const x = 1 / tK;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            const y = Math.log(row.beta / (tK * tK));
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            X.push(x);
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            Y.push(y);
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            points.push({ x, y });
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // Linear Regression Y = mX + b
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const n = points.length;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        let sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0, sumY2 = 0;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            sumX += X[i];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            sumY += Y[i];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            sumXY += X[i] * Y[i];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            sumX2 += X[i] * X[i];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            sumY2 += Y[i] * Y[i];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const xMean = sumX / n;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const yMean = sumY / n;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const numerator = sumXY - n * xMean * yMean;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const denominator = sumX2 - n * xMean * xMean;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        if (Math.abs(denominator) < 1e-12) {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            throw new Error("Unable to fit data (Zero variance in X).");
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const slope = numerator / denominator;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const intercept = yMean - slope * xMean;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // Calculate R^2
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const ssTot = sumY2 - n * yMean * yMean;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const ssRes = sumY2 - intercept * sumY - slope * sumXY;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const r2 = 1 - (ssRes / ssTot);
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // Calculate E and A
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // slope = -E/R => E = -slope * R
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const E_joules = -slope * R;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const E_kj = E_joules / 1000;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        if (E_kj <= 0) {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            throw new Error("Invalid activation energy (E ≤ 0), please check input data trends.");
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // intercept = ln(A*R/E) => A = (E/R) * exp(intercept)
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const A = (E_joules / R) * Math.exp(intercept);
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // Generate line points
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const minX = Math.min(...X);
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const maxX = Math.max(...X);
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const spanX = maxX - minX;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const padX = spanX * 0.1;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const line = [
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            { x: minX - padX, y: (minX - padX) * slope + intercept },
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            { x: maxX + padX, y: (maxX + padX) * slope + intercept }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        ];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // Isothermal Prediction
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const isoCurve = [];
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const tK_iso = isoTemp + 273.15;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // k = A * exp(-E/RT)
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const k = A * Math.exp(-E_joules / (R * tK_iso));
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // Let's predict until conversion (alpha) is 99%
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // alpha(t) = 1 - exp(-kt) => t = -ln(1-alpha)/k
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const t99 = -Math.log(1 - 0.99) / k;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        // Generate 100 points
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const steps = 100;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        const dt = t99 / steps;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        for(let i=0; i<=steps; i++) {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            const t = i * dt;
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            const alpha = 1 - Math.exp(-k * t);
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            isoCurve.push({ time: t, alpha: alpha * 100 });
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            type: 'KINETICS_RESULT',
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            payload: {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:                E: E_kj,
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:                A,
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:                r2,
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:                points,
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:                line,
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:                isoCurve,
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:                equation: `y = ${slope.toFixed(2)}x + ${intercept.toFixed(2)}`
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        });
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    } catch (e) {
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        self.postMessage({
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            type: 'ERROR',
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:            error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:        });
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:    }
lib/kineticsWorker.ts:};
lib/rsmWorker.ts:export interface RSMMessage {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  type: 'CALCULATE_RSM';
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    data: {x1: number, x2: number, y: number}[];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  };
lib/rsmWorker.ts:}
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:export interface RSMResponse {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  type: 'RSM_CALCULATED' | 'ERROR';
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  payload?: {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    beta: number[]; // [b0, b1, b2, b11, b22, b12]
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    stationaryPoint: {x1: number, x2: number, y: number} | null;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    grid: {x1: number, x2: number, y: number}[][]; // For heatmap/surface plot
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    minX1: number;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    maxX1: number;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    minX2: number;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    maxX2: number;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  };
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  error?: string;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:}
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:function invertMatrix(M: number[][]): number[][] {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  const n = M.length;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  const A = M.map((row, i) => {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const newRow = [...row];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      newRow.push(i === j ? 1 : 0);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    return newRow;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  });
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    let pivotRow = i;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    for (let j = i + 1; j < n; j++) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      if (Math.abs(A[j][i]) > Math.abs(A[pivotRow][i])) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:        pivotRow = j;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    if (pivotRow !== i) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      const temp = A[i];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      A[i] = A[pivotRow];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      A[pivotRow] = temp;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const pivot = A[i][i];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    if (Math.abs(pivot) < 1e-12) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      throw new Error("Matrix is singular");
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < 2 * n; j++) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      A[i][j] /= pivot;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      if (i !== j) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:        const factor = A[j][i];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:        for (let k = 0; k < 2 * n; k++) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:          A[j][k] -= factor * A[i][k];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:        }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  return A.map(row => row.slice(n));
lib/rsmWorker.ts:}
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:function multiplyMatrix(A: number[][], B: number[][]): number[][] {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  const m = A.length, n = A[0].length, p = B[0].length;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  const C = Array.from({length: m}, () => new Array(p).fill(0));
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  for(let i=0; i<m; i++){
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    for(let j=0; j<p; j++){
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      let sum = 0;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      for(let k=0; k<n; k++) sum += A[i][k] * B[k][j];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      C[i][j] = sum;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  return C;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:}
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:function transposeMatrix(A: number[][]): number[][] {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  const m = A.length, n = A[0].length;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  const C = Array.from({length: n}, () => new Array(m).fill(0));
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  for(let i=0; i<m; i++){
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    for(let j=0; j<n; j++){
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      C[j][i] = A[i][j];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  return C;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:}
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<RSMMessage>) => {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  try {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const { data } = e.data.payload;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    if (data.length < 6) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      throw new Error("RSM required at least 6 data points to fit a quadratic surface.");
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // Model: y = b0 + b1*x1 + b2*x2 + b11*x1^2 + b22*x2^2 + b12*x1*x2
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const X: number[][] = [];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const Y: number[][] = [];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    let minX1 = Infinity, maxX1 = -Infinity;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    let minX2 = Infinity, maxX2 = -Infinity;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    for (const p of data) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      X.push([1, p.x1, p.x2, p.x1 * p.x1, p.x2 * p.x2, p.x1 * p.x2]);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      Y.push([p.y]);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      if (p.x1 < minX1) minX1 = p.x1;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      if (p.x1 > maxX1) maxX1 = p.x1;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      if (p.x2 < minX2) minX2 = p.x2;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      if (p.x2 > maxX2) maxX2 = p.x2;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // Safety expansion
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const rangeX1 = maxX1 - minX1;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const rangeX2 = maxX2 - minX2;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    if (rangeX1 === 0 || rangeX2 === 0) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      throw new Error("Independent variables must have variation.");
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const X_T = transposeMatrix(X);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const X_T_X = multiplyMatrix(X_T, X);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const X_T_X_inv = invertMatrix(X_T_X);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const X_T_Y = multiplyMatrix(X_T, Y);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const betaMatrix = multiplyMatrix(X_T_X_inv, X_T_Y);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const beta = betaMatrix.map(row => row[0]);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // beta = [b0, b1, b2, b11, b22, b12]
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const [b0, b1, b2, b11, b22, b12] = beta;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // Find stationary point
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // dy/dx1 = b1 + 2*b11*x1 + b12*x2 = 0
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // dy/dx2 = b2 + 2*b22*x2 + b12*x1 = 0
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // 2*b11*x1 + b12*x2 = -b1
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // b12*x1 + 2*b22*x2 = -b2
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const D = 4 * b11 * b22 - b12 * b12;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    let stationaryPoint = null;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    if (Math.abs(D) > 1e-12) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      const x1_opt = (-2 * b1 * b22 + b2 * b12) / D;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      const x2_opt = (-2 * b2 * b11 + b1 * b12) / D;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      const y_opt = b0 + b1*x1_opt + b2*x2_opt + b11*x1_opt*x1_opt + b22*x2_opt*x2_opt + b12*x1_opt*x2_opt;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      stationaryPoint = { x1: x1_opt, x2: x2_opt, y: y_opt };
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // Generate grid for heatmap (say 30x30)
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const GRID_SIZE = 30;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const grid: {x1: number, x2: number, y: number}[][] = [];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    // Add margin to min/max
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const gMinX1 = minX1 - rangeX1 * 0.2;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const gMaxX1 = maxX1 + rangeX1 * 0.2;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const gMinX2 = minX2 - rangeX2 * 0.2;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    const gMaxX2 = maxX2 + rangeX2 * 0.2;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE; i++) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      const row = [];
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      const cx2 = gMinX2 + (i / (GRID_SIZE - 1)) * (gMaxX2 - gMinX2);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      for (let j = 0; j < GRID_SIZE; j++) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:        const cx1 = gMinX1 + (j / (GRID_SIZE - 1)) * (gMaxX1 - gMinX1);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:        const cy = b0 + b1*cx1 + b2*cx2 + b11*cx1*cx1 + b22*cx2*cx2 + b12*cx1*cx2;
lib/rsmWorker.ts:        row.push({ x1: cx1, x2: cx2, y: cy });
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      grid.push(row);
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      type: 'RSM_CALCULATED',
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      payload: { beta, stationaryPoint, grid, minX1: gMinX1, maxX1: gMaxX1, minX2: gMinX2, maxX2: gMaxX2 }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    });
lib/rsmWorker.ts:
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      type: 'ERROR',
lib/rsmWorker.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
lib/rsmWorker.ts:    });
lib/rsmWorker.ts:  }
lib/rsmWorker.ts:};
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:export type SpearmanMessage = {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  type: 'COMPUTE_SPEARMAN';
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    data: { id: string; values: Record<string, number> }[];
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    keys: string[];
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  };
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:};
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:export type SpearmanResponse = {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  type: 'SPEARMAN_RESULT';
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  payload: {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    matrix: number[][];
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    keys: string[];
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  };
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:} | {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  type: 'ERROR';
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  payload: { message: string };
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:};
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:// Compute ranks
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:function getRanks(arr: number[]): number[] {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  const sorted = arr.map((val, i) => ({ val, i })).sort((a, b) => a.val - b.val);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  const ranks = new Array(arr.length);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  let i = 0;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  while (i < sorted.length) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    let j = i;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    let sum = 0;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    while (j < sorted.length && sorted[j].val === sorted[i].val) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      sum += j + 1;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      j++;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    const avgRank = sum / (j - i);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    for (let k = i; k < j; k++) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      ranks[sorted[k].i] = avgRank;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    i = j;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  return ranks;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:}
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:self.onmessage = (e: MessageEvent<SpearmanMessage>) => {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  try {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    const { data, keys } = e.data.payload;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    if (!data.length || keys.length < 2) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      self.postMessage({ type: 'SPEARMAN_RESULT', payload: { matrix: [], keys } });
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      return;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    const n = data.length;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    const ranksByKey: Record<string, number[]> = {};
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    for (const key of keys) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      const values = data.map(d => d.values[key] ?? 0);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      ranksByKey[key] = getRanks(values);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    const matrix = Array(keys.length).fill(0).map(() => Array(keys.length).fill(0));
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      matrix[i][i] = 1;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      const rankX = ranksByKey[keys[i]];
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      const meanX = (n + 1) / 2; // mean of ranks 1 to n is (n+1)/2
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      let sumSqX = 0;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      for (const r of rankX) sumSqX += Math.pow(r - meanX, 2);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      for (let j = i + 1; j < keys.length; j++) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        const rankY = ranksByKey[keys[j]];
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        const meanY = meanX; // Same mean
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        // Let's use standard Pearson on ranks for ties properly
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        let sumSqY = 0;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        for (const r of rankY) sumSqY += Math.pow(r - meanY, 2);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        let sumXY = 0;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        for (let k = 0; k < n; k++) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:          sumXY += (rankX[k] - meanX) * (rankY[k] - meanY);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        const denom = Math.sqrt(sumSqX * sumSqY);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        const rho = denom === 0 ? 0 : sumXY / denom;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        matrix[i][j] = rho;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:        matrix[j][i] = rho;
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:      }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({ type: 'SPEARMAN_RESULT', payload: { matrix, keys } } as SpearmanResponse);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  } catch (error) {
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:    self.postMessage({ type: 'ERROR', payload: { message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' } } as SpearmanResponse);
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:  }
lib/spearmanWorker.ts:};

docs/OPTIMIZATION_ROADMAP.md:# Optimization Roadmap

components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:class QuadTree {
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    root: QuadTreeNode;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    constructor(boundary: { x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number }, capacity: number = 4) {
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        this.root = { boundary, capacity, points: [], divided: false };
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    }
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    insert(p: Point, node: QuadTreeNode = this.root): boolean {
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        if (!this.contains(node.boundary, p)) return false;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        if (node.points.length < node.capacity && !node.divided) {
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:            node.points.push(p);
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:            return true;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        }
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        if (!node.divided) {
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:            this.subdivide(node);
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        }
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        return (
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:            this.insert(p, node.northWest!) ||
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:            this.insert(p, node.northEast!) ||
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:            this.insert(p, node.southWest!) ||
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:            this.insert(p, node.southEast!)
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        );
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    }
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    subdivide(node: QuadTreeNode) {
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        const x = node.boundary.x;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        const y = node.boundary.y;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        const w = node.boundary.w / 2;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        const h = node.boundary.h / 2;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        node.northWest = { boundary: { x, y, w, h }, capacity: node.capacity, points: [], divided: false };
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        node.northEast = { boundary: { x: x + w, y, w, h }, capacity: node.capacity, points: [], divided: false };
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        node.southWest = { boundary: { x, y: y + h, w, h }, capacity: node.capacity, points: [], divided: false };
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        node.southEast = { boundary: { x: x + w, y: y + h, w, h }, capacity: node.capacity, points: [], divided: false };
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        node.divided = true;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    }
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    contains(b: { x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number }, p: Point) {
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        return (p.x >= b.x && p.x <= b.x + b.w && p.y >= b.y && p.y <= b.y + b.h);
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    }
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    query(range: { x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number }, node: QuadTreeNode = this.root, found: Point[] = []) {
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        if (!this.intersects(node.boundary, range)) return found;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        for (const p of node.points) {

components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        if (node.divided) {

components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:           this.query(range, node.northEast!, found);
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:           this.query(range, node.southWest!, found);
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:           this.query(range, node.southEast!, found);
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        }
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:        return found;
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    }
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:
components/charts/CanvasScatterGraph.tsx:    intersects(b1: { x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number }, b2: { x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number }) {

components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:// Carreau-Yasuda parameters for polymer melt simulation
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:// η = η0 * [1 + (λ * γ̇)^a]^((n-1)/a)
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:const simulateCarreauYasuda = (
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  mfr: number,
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  tempOffset: number,
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  rate: number,
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:) => {
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  // Physical Scaling: Low MFR -> High Viscosity
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  // We use Power Law base for Zero-Shear Viscosity approximation
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  const eta0 = (80000 / Math.pow(Math.max(0.1, mfr), 0.8)) * Math.exp(tempOffset * -0.025);
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  const lambda = 0.5 * Math.pow(Math.max(0.1, mfr), 0.4); 
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  const n = 0.32; // Pseudoplasticity index
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  const a = 2.0; // Transition parameter
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  const viscosity = eta0 * Math.pow(1 + Math.pow(lambda * rate, a), (n - 1) / a);
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:  return viscosity;
components/charts/RheologyCurve.ts:};

components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:import React, { useEffect, useRef, useMemo } from 'react';
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:import * as echarts from 'echarts';
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:import { useTheme } from '../../contexts/ThemeContext';
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:import { Product } from '../../types';
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:import { useCarreauWorker } from '../../hooks/useCarreau';
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:import { Loader2, Zap } from 'lucide-react';
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:import { motion } from 'motion/react';
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:interface RheologyGraphProps {
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  products: Product[];
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  temps: number[];
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:}
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:const simulateRawPoints = (mfr: number, tempOffset: number) => {
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:   const eta0 = (80000 / Math.pow(Math.max(0.1, mfr), 0.8)) * Math.exp(tempOffset * -0.025);
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:   const lambda = 0.5 * Math.pow(Math.max(0.1, mfr), 0.4); 
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:   const n = 0.32; 
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:   const a = 2.0;
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:   const data: [number, number][] = [];
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:   for (let i = -2; i <= 6; i += 0.5) {
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:       const rate = Math.pow(10, i);
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:       // Add some noise to make it realistic for fitting
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:       const noise = 1 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.15; // 15% noise max
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:       const viscosity = eta0 * Math.pow(1 + Math.pow(lambda * rate, a), (n - 1) / a) * noise;
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:       data.push([rate, viscosity]);
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:   }
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:   return data;
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:};
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:export const RheologyGraph: React.FC<RheologyGraphProps> = React.memo(({ products, temps }) => {
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  const chartRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  const chartInstance = useRef<echarts.ECharts | null>(null);
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  const { theme } = useTheme();
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  const { fittedParams, isFitting, fitCarreau, error } = useCarreauWorker();
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  // For UI, just fit the first product at the first temp 
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  // (In reality, we'd iterate, but showing one physical card is best)
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  const mainProduct = products[0];
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  const targetTemp = temps[0] || 190;
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  const rawDataPoints = useMemo(() => {
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:      if (!mainProduct) return [];
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:      const flowVal = mainProduct.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value || mainProduct.properties['MFR']?.value || 5;
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:      const mfr = parseFloat(String(flowVal));
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:      return simulateRawPoints(isNaN(mfr) ? 5 : mfr, targetTemp - 190);
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  }, [mainProduct, targetTemp]);
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:     if (rawDataPoints.length > 0) {
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:         fitCarreau(rawDataPoints.map(d => d[0]), rawDataPoints.map(d => d[1]));
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:     }
components/charts/RheologyGraph.tsx:  }, [rawDataPoints, fitCarreau]);

components/AiCopilot.tsx:    // Basic parser for structured actions in AI response
components/AiCopilot.tsx:    // Format: [[ACTION:TYPE:PAYLOAD:LABEL]]
components/AiCopilot.tsx:    // Example: [[ACTION:DELETE:["id1"]:Delete suggested duplicates]]
components/AiCopilot.tsx:    const regex = /\[\[ACTION:(\w+):(.+):(.+)\]\]/;

components/AiCopilot.tsx:    if (match) {
components/AiCopilot.tsx:      try {
components/AiCopilot.tsx:        return {
components/AiCopilot.tsx:          type: match[1],
components/AiCopilot.tsx:          payload: JSON.parse(match[2]),
components/AiCopilot.tsx:          label: match[3],
components/AiCopilot.tsx:          cleanContent: content.replace(regex, "").trim(),
components/AiCopilot.tsx:        };
components/AiCopilot.tsx:      } catch (e) {
components/AiCopilot.tsx:        logger.error("Failed to parse AI action:", e);
components/AiCopilot.tsx:      }
components/AiCopilot.tsx:    }

components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:  const handleAnalyze = useCallback(async () => {
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:    if (!product) return;
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:    setIsGenerating(prev => {
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:      if (prev) return prev;
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:      return true;
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:    });
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:    try {
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:      const result = await aiService.analyzeProduct(product);
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:      setAnalysis(result);
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:    } catch (error) {
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:      console.error("AI Analysis failed:", error);
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:      setAnalysis("Error generating analysis. Please check your connection and try again.");

components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:      setIsGenerating(false);
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:    }
components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:  }, [product]);

components/SmartAnalysisModal.tsx:      setAnalysis("");

components/DashboardStats.tsx:import React, { useMemo } from "react";
components/DashboardStats.tsx:import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "motion/react";
components/DashboardStats.tsx:import { Layers, Database, Zap, RefreshCw } from "lucide-react";
components/DashboardStats.tsx:import { Product } from "../types";
components/DashboardStats.tsx:import { SummaryCard } from "./DashboardComponents";
components/DashboardStats.tsx:import { calculateCompleteness } from "../productUtils";
components/DashboardStats.tsx:
components/DashboardStats.tsx:interface DashboardStatsProps {
components/DashboardStats.tsx:  allProducts: Product[];
components/DashboardStats.tsx:  showSummary: boolean;
components/DashboardStats.tsx:  t: (key: string, fallback?: string) => string;
components/DashboardStats.tsx:}
components/DashboardStats.tsx:
components/DashboardStats.tsx:export const DashboardStats: React.FC<DashboardStatsProps> = React.memo(
components/DashboardStats.tsx:  ({ allProducts, showSummary, t }) => {
components/DashboardStats.tsx:    const summaryStats = useMemo(() => {
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      const len = allProducts.length;
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      if (!len) return { mfgCount: 0, avgComp: 0 };
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      const manufacturers = new Set<string>();
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      let totalScore = 0;
components/DashboardStats.tsx:
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
components/DashboardStats.tsx:        const p = allProducts[i];
components/DashboardStats.tsx:        manufacturers.add(p.manufacturer);
components/DashboardStats.tsx:        totalScore += calculateCompleteness(p);
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      }
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      return {
components/DashboardStats.tsx:        mfgCount: manufacturers.size,
components/DashboardStats.tsx:        avgComp: Math.round(totalScore / len),
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      };
components/DashboardStats.tsx:    }, [allProducts]);
components/DashboardStats.tsx:
components/DashboardStats.tsx:    return (
components/DashboardStats.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 shrink-0">
components/DashboardStats.tsx:        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
components/DashboardStats.tsx:          {showSummary && (
components/DashboardStats.tsx:            <motion.div
components/DashboardStats.tsx:              variants={{
components/DashboardStats.tsx:                hidden: { height: 0, opacity: 0, y: -10 },
components/DashboardStats.tsx:                show: {
components/DashboardStats.tsx:                  height: "auto",
components/DashboardStats.tsx:                  opacity: 1,
components/DashboardStats.tsx:                  y: 0,
components/DashboardStats.tsx:                  transition: {
components/DashboardStats.tsx:                    staggerChildren: 0.05,
components/DashboardStats.tsx:                    duration: 0.4,

components/BatchEditModal.tsx:  const [manufacturer, setManufacturer] = useState("");

components/BatchEditModal.tsx:    Record<string, { value: string; unit: string; enabled: boolean }>
components/BatchEditModal.tsx:  >({});
components/BatchEditModal.tsx:

components/BatchEditModal.tsx:

components/BatchEditModal.tsx:

components/BatchEditModal.tsx:            !isNaN(numVal) && data.value.trim() !== "" ? numVal : data.value,

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:interface TreeNodeProps {
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  category: Category;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  selectedIds: Set<string>;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  onToggle: (id: string) => void;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  depth: number;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  forceExpand?: boolean | null;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  counts?: Record<string, number>;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  isLast?: boolean;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:}
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:export const TreeNode = React.memo<TreeNodeProps>(
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  ({
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    category,
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    selectedIds,
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    onToggle,
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    depth,
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    forceExpand = null,
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    counts = {},
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    isLast = false,
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:  }) => {
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(depth < 1);
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    const hasChildren = category.children && category.children.length > 0;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    const isSelected = selectedIds.has(category.id);
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    const { language } = useLanguage();
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:      if (forceExpand !== null) {
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:        setIsExpanded(forceExpand);
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:      }
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    }, [forceExpand]);
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    const displayOpen = forceExpand !== null ? forceExpand : isExpanded;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    const count = counts[category.id] || 0;
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    const handleToggle = (e: React.SyntheticEvent) => {
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:      e.stopPropagation();
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:      onToggle(category.id);
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    };
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    const handleExpand = (e: React.SyntheticEvent) => {
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:      e.stopPropagation();
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:      if (hasChildren) setIsExpanded(!displayOpen);
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    };
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:    return (
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:      <div className="select-none relative">
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:        {depth > 0 && (
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:          <div
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:            className="absolute border-l-2 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 h-full top-0"
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:            style={{
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:              left: `${(depth - 1) * 16 + 20}px`,
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:              height: isLast ? "20px" : "100%",
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:            }}
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:          >
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:            <div className="absolute top-[20px] left-0 w-3 border-t-2 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800"></div>
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:          </div>
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:        )}

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:        <motion.div

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:            backgroundColor: isSelected

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:        `}

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:          }}

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:            if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") {
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:              e.preventDefault();
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:              handleToggle(e);
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:            }
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:          }}

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:                e.preventDefault();
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:                handleExpand(e);

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:
components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:          {/* Checkbox UI */}

components/ui/TreeNode.tsx:          {/* Icon based on state */}

components/PivotView.tsx:interface PivotRow {
components/PivotView.tsx:  _groupKey: string;
components/PivotView.tsx:  _level: number;
components/PivotView.tsx:  _count: number;
components/PivotView.tsx:  _items: Product[];

components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:export const PivotView: React.FC<PivotViewProps> = ({ data, columns, formulas }) => {
components/PivotView.tsx:  const { tProp } = useLanguage();
components/PivotView.tsx:  
components/PivotView.tsx:  // Pivot Configuration State
components/PivotView.tsx:  const [rowGroups, setRowGroups] = useState<string[]>(["gradeName"]);
components/PivotView.tsx:  const [valueMetrics, setValueMetrics] = useState<string[]>([]);
components/PivotView.tsx:  const [aggType, setAggType] = useState<"avg" | "sum" | "count" | "min" | "max">("avg");
components/PivotView.tsx:  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<"table" | "chart">("table");
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:  const availableCols = useMemo(() => {
components/PivotView.tsx:    return columns.filter(c => !c.isSystem);
components/PivotView.tsx:  }, [columns]);
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:  const numericCols = useMemo(() => {
components/PivotView.tsx:    return availableCols.filter(c => {
components/PivotView.tsx:      // Heuristic for numeric columns
components/PivotView.tsx:      const sample = data.length > 0 ? data[0].properties[c.key]?.value : null;
components/PivotView.tsx:      return typeof sample === "number" || (c.isComputed);
components/PivotView.tsx:    });
components/PivotView.tsx:  }, [availableCols, data]);
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:  // Pivot Logic
components/PivotView.tsx:  const formulaExecutor = useMemo(() => formulaEngine.compileGraph(formulas), [formulas]);
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:  const pivotData = useMemo(() => {
components/PivotView.tsx:    if (rowGroups.length === 0) return [];
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:    const groupRecursive = (items: Product[], groupIdx: number): PivotRow[] => {
components/PivotView.tsx:      const groupKey = rowGroups[groupIdx];
components/PivotView.tsx:      const col = columns.find(c => c.key === groupKey);
components/PivotView.tsx:      
components/PivotView.tsx:      const grouped = groupBy(items, (item) => {
components/PivotView.tsx:        if (col?.isComputed && col.formulaId) {
components/PivotView.tsx:          const f = formulas.find(form => form.id === col.formulaId);
components/PivotView.tsx:          if (f) {
components/PivotView.tsx:            return formulaExecutor(item)[f.id] ?? "N/A";
components/PivotView.tsx:          }
components/PivotView.tsx:        }
components/PivotView.tsx:        const val = (item.properties[groupKey]?.value ?? (item as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[groupKey]);
components/PivotView.tsx:        return val ?? "N/A";
components/PivotView.tsx:      });
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:      return Object.entries(grouped).map(([key, groupItems]) => {
components/PivotView.tsx:        const row: PivotRow = {
components/PivotView.tsx:          _groupKey: key,
components/PivotView.tsx:          _level: groupIdx,
components/PivotView.tsx:          _count: groupItems.length,
components/PivotView.tsx:          _items: groupItems,
components/PivotView.tsx:        };
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:        // Calculate metrics
components/PivotView.tsx:        valueMetrics.forEach(mKey => {
components/PivotView.tsx:          const col = columns.find(c => c.key === mKey);
components/PivotView.tsx:          const values = groupItems.map(item => {
components/PivotView.tsx:             if (col?.isComputed && col.formulaId) {
components/PivotView.tsx:                const f = formulas.find(form => form.id === col.formulaId);
components/PivotView.tsx:                return f ? formulaExecutor(item)[f.id] : 0;
components/PivotView.tsx:             }
components/PivotView.tsx:             return item.properties[mKey]?.value ?? 0;
components/PivotView.tsx:          }).filter(v => typeof v === "number") as number[];
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:          if (values.length === 0) {
components/PivotView.tsx:            row[mKey] = 0;
components/PivotView.tsx:            return;
components/PivotView.tsx:          }
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:          switch(aggType) {
components/PivotView.tsx:            case "sum": row[mKey] = values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0); break;
components/PivotView.tsx:            case "avg": row[mKey] = values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / values.length; break;
components/PivotView.tsx:            case "min": row[mKey] = Math.min(...values); break;
components/PivotView.tsx:            case "max": row[mKey] = Math.max(...values); break;
components/PivotView.tsx:            case "count": row[mKey] = values.length; break;
components/PivotView.tsx:          }
components/PivotView.tsx:        });
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:        if (groupIdx < rowGroups.length - 1) {
components/PivotView.tsx:          row._children = groupRecursive(groupItems, groupIdx + 1);
components/PivotView.tsx:        }
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:        return row;
components/PivotView.tsx:      });
components/PivotView.tsx:    };
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:    return groupRecursive(data, 0);
components/PivotView.tsx:  }, [data, rowGroups, valueMetrics, aggType, columns, formulas, formulaExecutor]);
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:  const [expandedRows, setExpandedRows] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:  const toggleExpand = (path: string) => {
components/PivotView.tsx:    setExpandedRows(prev => {
components/PivotView.tsx:      const next = new Set(prev);
components/PivotView.tsx:      if (next.has(path)) next.delete(path);
components/PivotView.tsx:      else next.add(path);
components/PivotView.tsx:      return next;
components/PivotView.tsx:    });
components/PivotView.tsx:  };
components/PivotView.tsx:
components/PivotView.tsx:  return (
components/PivotView.tsx:    <div className="flex h-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950 overflow-hidden">
components/PivotView.tsx:      {/* Configuration Sidebar */}
components/PivotView.tsx:      <div className="w-80 border-r border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-white dark:bg-slate-950 p-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
components/PivotView.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8">

components/PivotView.tsx:            <div className="space-y-2">
components/PivotView.tsx:              {availableCols.map(col => (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          if (!isNaN(num)) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            props.add(key);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      }

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      // Compile float boundaries ONCE outside the main 50,000 document iteration loop
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      const compiledFilters = filterKeys.map((key) => ({
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        key,
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        min: filters[key].min === "" ? -Infinity : parseFloat(filters[key].min),
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        max: filters[key].max === "" ? Infinity : parseFloat(filters[key].max),
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      }));
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      const numFilters = compiledFilters.length;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      const res: Product[] = [];
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      const len = baseData.length;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        const p = baseData[i];
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        let pass = true;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        for (let f = 0; f < numFilters; f++) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const rule = compiledFilters[f];
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const rawVal = p.properties[rule.key]?.value;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const numVal =
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            typeof rawVal === "number" ? rawVal : parseFloat(String(rawVal));
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          if (isNaN(numVal) || numVal < rule.min || numVal > rule.max) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            pass = false;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            break;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        if (pass) res.push(p);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      return res;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:    }, [baseData, filters]);

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      if (val === undefined || val === null || val === "") return fallback;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      const num = parseFloat(String(val));
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      return isNaN(num) ? fallback : num;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:    }, []);

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:    const getVal = useCallback(
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      (p: Product, key: string): number => {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        if (key.startsWith("formula_")) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const id = key.replace("formula_", "");
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const f = formulas.find((form) => form.id === id);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          if (!f) return 0;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          try {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            const val = formulaExecutor(p)[f.id];
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            return typeof val === "number" ? val : parseFloat(String(val)) || 0;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          } catch {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            return 0;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        return safeParse(p.properties[key]?.value);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      },
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      [formulas, safeParse, formulaExecutor],
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:    );

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        if (!hasPropMatch(["密度", "Density"])) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          xAxis = numericProperties[0] || "乙烯含量";

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:    const handleExport = async (format: "png" | "json") => {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      setIsExporting(true);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      try {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        if (format === "png" && chartInstance) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const dataUrl = chartInstance.getDataURL({
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            type: "png",
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            pixelRatio: 2,
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            backgroundColor: "#fff",
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          });
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const a = document.createElement("a");
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          a.style.display = 'none';
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          a.href = dataUrl;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_analysis.png`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          document.body.appendChild(a);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          a.click();
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          setTimeout(() => document.body.removeChild(a), 100);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        } else if (format === "json") {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const jsonStr = JSON.stringify(currentChartData, null, 2);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const blob = new Blob([jsonStr], { type: "application/json" });
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const a = document.createElement("a");
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          a.style.display = 'none';
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          a.href = url;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_data.json`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          document.body.appendChild(a);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          a.click();
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          setTimeout(() => {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            document.body.removeChild(a);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          }, 100);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      } catch (e) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        logger.error("Failed to export chart:", e);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      } finally {

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:    // Check if we have valid data for the current view to show improved empty state

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      if (Array.isArray(currentChartData)) return currentChartData.length > 0;

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      // 2. Series-based data (Scatter/Radar/Parallel)

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:    const activeInsight = useMemo(() => {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      const insight = materialEngine.generateExpertInsight(activeChart);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      const chartData = currentChartData as { series?: { name: string; data: [number, number][] }[] };
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      // 1. Ashby/Scatter Statistical Rigor
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      if ((activeChart === 'ashby' || activeChart === 'mfr_density') && chartData?.series) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        const allPoints: [number, number][] = [];
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        chartData.series.forEach((s) => {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          if (Array.isArray(s.data)) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            s.data.forEach((d) => {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              if (Array.isArray(d) && typeof d[0] === 'number' && typeof d[1] === 'number') {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                allPoints.push([d[0], d[1]]);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            });
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        });
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        if (allPoints.length > 3) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const corr = materialEngine.analyzeCorrelation(allPoints);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          const pearson = materialEngine.calculatePearson(allPoints);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          if (corr && corr.r2 > 0.05) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            const ci = materialEngine.calculateCI(allPoints, corr.slope, corr.intercept);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            const pValue = materialEngine.calculatePValue(pearson, allPoints.length);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            const spearman = materialEngine.calculateSpearman(allPoints);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            const integrity = materialEngine.analyzeDatalineIntegrity(allPoints, corr.slope, corr.intercept);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            insight.content += `\n\n[高阶数理统计报告]`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            insight.content += `\n- 线性关联 (Pearson r): ${pearson.toFixed(4)}`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            insight.content += `\n- 单调关联 (Spearman ρ): ${spearman.toFixed(4)}`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            insight.content += `\n- 统计显著性 (P-Value): ${pValue < 0.001 ? "< 0.001" : pValue.toFixed(4)}`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            insight.content += `\n- 拟合置信度 (R²): ${(corr.r2 * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            if (pValue < 0.05) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              const relType = Math.abs(pearson - spearman) > 0.2 ? "非线性单调" : "高度线性";
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              insight.content += `\n- 物理逻辑判定: 存在${relType}正相关`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            } else {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              insight.content += `\n- 结论强度: 统计不显著 (数据可能受实验误差主导)`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            if (ci) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              insight.content += `\n- 斜率置信区间 (95%): [${ci.lower.toFixed(2)}, ${ci.upper.toFixed(2)}]`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            if (integrity.healthScore < 80) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              insight.content += `\n- ⚠️ 稳健性提示: 模型受 ${integrity.influentialPointsCount} 个高槓杆特征点主导，置信度受限。`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            // Robust Outlier Detection
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            const xValues = allPoints.map(p => p[0]);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            const iqrOutliers = materialEngine.findOutliersIQR(xValues);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            if (iqrOutliers.length > 0) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              insight.content += `\n- 离群值排查: 检测到 ${iqrOutliers.length} 个实验偏离点，已通过 IQR 算法标记。`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            // Enhanced Distribution Analysis
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            const stats = materialEngine.getStats(xValues);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            if (stats) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              const momentsX = materialEngine.calculateDistributionMoments(xValues);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              const isNormal = Math.abs(momentsX?.skewness || 0) < 0.5;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:              insight.content += `\n- 样本数理性: ${isNormal ? "符合正态分布" : "呈现偏态分布"}${!isNormal ? ` (SK: ${momentsX?.skewness.toFixed(2)})` : ""}`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            insight.content += `\n- 决策建议: ${pearson > 0.7 && pValue < 0.05 ? "模型具备高度物理预测力，可直接用于牌号配方反推。" : "数理关联一般，建议排除干扰项或增加样本量。"}`;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      // 2. Radar Chart - Quality Balance Score
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      const chartObj = currentChartData as { series?: { name: string; value: number[] }[] };
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      if (activeChart === 'radar' && chartObj?.series) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        const series = chartObj.series;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        insight.content += `\n\n[材料性能均衡性评价]`;
