components/DataVisualizer.tsx:          }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:        });
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:      return insight;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:    }, [activeChart, currentChartData]);

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                                 }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                             }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                        }

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                  if (projected.length === filteredData.length) {

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      yVals = projected.map(p => scatterYKey === "PC1" ? p[0] : scatterYKey === "PC2" ? p[1] : 0);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                  }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:               } else {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                  xVals = scatterXKey.startsWith('formula-') 
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                     ? filteredData.map(p => formulaExecutor(p)[scatterXKey.replace('formula-', '')] || 0) 
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                     : filteredData.map(p => parseFloat(String(p.properties?.[scatterXKey]?.value)) || 0);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                  yVals = scatterYKey.startsWith('formula-') 
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                     ? filteredData.map(p => formulaExecutor(p)[scatterYKey.replace('formula-', '')] || 0) 
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                     : filteredData.map(p => parseFloat(String(p.properties?.[scatterYKey]?.value)) || 0);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:               }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:               return (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                <div className="absolute inset-0 pt-32 pb-10 px-8">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                    <CanvasScatterGraph 
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        data={filteredData}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        xKey={scatterXKey}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        yKey={scatterYKey}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        xLabel={scatterXKey.startsWith('formula-') ? formulas.find(f => f.id === scatterXKey.replace('formula-', ''))?.name || scatterXKey : scatterXKey}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        yLabel={scatterYKey.startsWith('formula-') ? formulas.find(f => f.id === scatterYKey.replace('formula-', ''))?.name || scatterYKey : scatterYKey}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        xValues={xVals}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        yValues={yVals}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        clusters={Object.keys(clusters).length > 0 ? clusters : undefined}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        paretoFrontIds={enablePareto ? paretoFrontIds : undefined}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                        enableConvexHull={enableConvexHull}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                    />
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:               );
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            })() : activeChart === "similarity_graph" ? (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="mb-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-white">Material Similarity Network</h3>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Cosine similarity representation highlighting identical performance topological regions based on selected dimensions.</p>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden relative">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       {similarityFeatures.length < 2 ? (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-500 font-bold text-sm">

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : isCalculatingSim ? (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <SimilarityGraph nodes={simNodes} edges={simEdges} theme={theme} />
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       )}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            ) : activeChart === "rsm" ? (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="mb-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-white">响应面法 (RSM) 高通量配方优化</h3>

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden relative">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       {rsmError ? (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               请在左侧面板选择需要监控的检验特征（Target Property），设定工厂允收公差范围 (USL / LSL) 进行统计分析。请确保数据表中拥有同一牌号/材料的多批次实测数据记录。

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                    </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       )}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            ) : activeChart === "bayes" ? (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="mb-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2"><BrainCircuit className="text-pink-500"/> 基于高斯过程的贝叶斯逆向设计 (Bayesian Optimization)</h3>

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       {bayesError ? (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               <Loader2 className="animate-spin" size={32} />

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : !bayesResult ? (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 font-bold text-sm bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700 text-center max-w-md mx-auto p-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               请在左侧面板选择作为建模特征的独立变量 (自变量 X) 和期望优化的目标特征 (因变量 Y)，然后点击【逆向推荐下一组材料配方】。该算法将从历史数据中建立高斯过程代理模型并推荐全局最优搜索点。
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="w-full h-full flex gap-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               {/* Main Chart */}

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                            ))}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                        </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                    </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       )}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            ) : activeChart === "moo" ? (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="mb-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2"><GitMerge className="text-orange-500"/> 多目标帕累托前沿探索 (Multi-Objective Pareto)</h3>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Constructs parallel independent GP surrogates for selected properties and resolves non-dominated Pareto Front using scalarized candidate ranking.</p>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 bg-white/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-3xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 p-4 pb-8 relative shadow-lg shadow-slate-200/50 dark:shadow-none">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       {mooError ? (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-rose-600 font-bold text-sm bg-rose-50/50 rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 p-4 font-mono">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               执行失败: {mooError}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : isCalculatingMoo ? (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-orange-600 gap-2 bg-white/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 rounded-2xl backdrop-blur-sm z-10">

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : !mooResult ? (

components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               准备就绪。请在左侧面板选择自变量与至少2个约束目标，将自动求解妥协议。
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <MooChart
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               evaluatedCandidates={mooResult.evaluatedCandidates}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               paretoFront={mooResult.paretoFront}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               historical={mooResult.historical}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               targets={mooResult.targets}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               theme={theme}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           />
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       )}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:            ) : activeChart === "mahalanobis" ? (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                <div className="absolute inset-0 pt-32 pb-10 px-8 flex flex-col">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="mb-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2"><Target className="text-rose-600"/> 多元马氏距离异常检测 (Mahalanobis Anomaly)</h3>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Based on multivariate normal distribution assumption. Uses inverted covariance matrix to find Mahalanobis distance ($D^2$) and evaluate against Chi-Square thresholds.</p>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                   <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden relative">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       {mahalanobisError ? (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-rose-600 font-bold text-sm bg-rose-50/50 rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 p-4 font-mono">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               执行失败: {mahalanobisError}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : isCalculatingMahalanobis ? (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-rose-600 gap-2 bg-white/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 rounded-2xl backdrop-blur-sm z-10">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               <Loader2 className="animate-spin" size={32} />
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               <span className="text-sm font-bold animate-pulse">Running Mahalanobis Distances...</span>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : !mahalanobisResult ? (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 font-bold text-sm bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700 text-center max-w-md mx-auto p-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               请在左侧面板选择 3-5 个数值特征并在底端点击【生成特征联合异常排查图谱】。系统将求解协方差逆矩阵，寻找在单一维度看起来正常，但在多维联合分布中显著背离群体特性的异常批次。
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                       ) : (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                           <div className="w-full h-full flex gap-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               <div className="flex-1 rounded-xl shadow-inner bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700 p-2 relative">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                    <MahalanobisChart 
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                        distances={mahalanobisResult.distances}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                        threshold={mahalanobisResult.threshold}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                        theme={theme}
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                    />
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                               <div className="w-80 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar pr-2 flex flex-col gap-4">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                    <div className="bg-rose-50 dark:bg-rose-900/30 p-4 rounded-xl border border-rose-200 dark:border-rose-800">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                            <ShieldAlert size={18} className="text-rose-600 dark:text-rose-400" />
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                            <h4 className="font-black text-sm uppercase text-rose-800 dark:text-rose-400">发现离群点 (Outliers)</h4>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                        </div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                        {(() => {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                            const outliers = mahalanobisResult.distances.filter(d => d.isOutlier).sort((a,b) => b.distance - a.distance);
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                            if (outliers.length === 0) {
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                                return <div className="text-sm text-emerald-600 font-bold">目前所有样本均处于当前特征联合置信区间内。</div>;
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                            }
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                            return (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                                <div className="space-y-2">
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                                    <div className="text-xs text-rose-600 mb-2">找到 {outliers.length} 个异常批次：</div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                                    {outliers.map(o => (
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                                            <div className="font-bold text-xs truncate" title={o.name}>{o.name}</div>
components/DataVisualizer.tsx:                                                            <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 mt-1 flex justify-between">

components/ImportModal.tsx:
components/ImportModal.tsx:  // Non-blocking CSV Parser with proper quoted field support
components/ImportModal.tsx:  const parseCSV = async (
components/ImportModal.tsx:    file: File,
components/ImportModal.tsx:    onProgress: (progress: number) => void,
components/ImportModal.tsx:  ): Promise<Product[]> => {
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const text = await file.text();
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const lines = text.split(/\r?\n/);
components/ImportModal.tsx:    if (lines.length < 2) return [];
components/ImportModal.tsx:
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const products: Product[] = [];
components/ImportModal.tsx:
components/ImportModal.tsx:    // Helper to parse a single CSV line into an array of strings
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const parseCSVLine = (line: string) => {
components/ImportModal.tsx:      const result = [];
components/ImportModal.tsx:      let currentField = "";
components/ImportModal.tsx:      let inQuotes = false;
components/ImportModal.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
components/ImportModal.tsx:        const char = line[i];
components/ImportModal.tsx:        if (char === '"') {
components/ImportModal.tsx:          if (inQuotes && line[i + 1] === '"') {
components/ImportModal.tsx:            currentField += '"';
components/ImportModal.tsx:            i++;
components/ImportModal.tsx:          } else {
components/ImportModal.tsx:            inQuotes = !inQuotes;
components/ImportModal.tsx:          }
components/ImportModal.tsx:        } else if (char === "," && !inQuotes) {
components/ImportModal.tsx:          result.push(currentField.trim());
components/ImportModal.tsx:          currentField = "";
components/ImportModal.tsx:        } else {
components/ImportModal.tsx:          currentField += char;
components/ImportModal.tsx:        }
components/ImportModal.tsx:      }
components/ImportModal.tsx:      result.push(currentField.trim());
components/ImportModal.tsx:      return result;
components/ImportModal.tsx:    };
components/ImportModal.tsx:
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const headers = parseCSVLine(lines[0]).map((h) => h.toLowerCase());
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const gradeIdx = headers.findIndex(
components/ImportModal.tsx:      (h) => h.includes("grade") || h.includes("牌号"),
components/ImportModal.tsx:    );
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const manIdx = headers.findIndex(
components/ImportModal.tsx:      (h) => h.includes("manufacturer") || h.includes("厂家"),
components/ImportModal.tsx:    );
components/ImportModal.tsx:
components/ImportModal.tsx:    if (gradeIdx === -1) {
components/ImportModal.tsx:      throw new Error("Missing required column: Grade/牌号");
components/ImportModal.tsx:    }
components/ImportModal.tsx:
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const totalLines = lines.length;
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const chunkSize = 200; // Smaller chunks for more responsiveness
components/ImportModal.tsx:
components/ImportModal.tsx:    for (let startIndex = 1; startIndex < totalLines; startIndex += chunkSize) {
components/ImportModal.tsx:      // Yield to main thread to keep UI responsive
components/ImportModal.tsx:      await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 0));
components/ImportModal.tsx:      onProgress(Math.floor((startIndex / totalLines) * 100));
components/ImportModal.tsx:
components/ImportModal.tsx:      const endChunk = Math.min(startIndex + chunkSize, totalLines);
components/ImportModal.tsx:      for (let i = startIndex; i < endChunk; i++) {
components/ImportModal.tsx:        const line = lines[i].trim();
components/ImportModal.tsx:        if (!line) continue;
components/ImportModal.tsx:        
components/ImportModal.tsx:        const cols = parseCSVLine(line);

components/ImportModal.tsx:            // Common mapping

components/ImportModal.tsx:            else if (h.includes("mfr") || h.includes("熔体")) key = "熔体质量流动速率";

components/ImportModal.tsx:            const val = parseFloat(cols[idx]);

components/ImportModal.tsx:  const formatFileSize = (bytes: number) => {
components/ImportModal.tsx:    if (bytes === 0) return "0 B";
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const k = 1024;
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const sizes = ["B", "KB", "MB", "GB"];
components/ImportModal.tsx:    const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
components/ImportModal.tsx:    return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(1)) + " " + sizes[i];

components/ComparisonView.tsx:                              const lowBest = isLowBest(propKey);

components/ComparisonView.tsx:                              let diffDisplay = null;

components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                baselineId &&
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                baselineId !== p.id &&
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                !isNaN(numVal)
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                              ) {

components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                  baselineProduct?.properties[propKey];
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                const baselineVal = Number(baselineProp?.value);
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                if (!isNaN(baselineVal) && baselineVal !== 0) {
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                  const diff =
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                    ((numVal - baselineVal) / baselineVal) *
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                    100;
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                  const isZero = Math.abs(diff) < 0.01;
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                  const isGood = lowBest ? diff < 0 : diff > 0;
components/ComparisonView.tsx:
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                  diffDisplay = (
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                    <div
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      className={`flex items-center gap-0.5 text-[9px] font-mono font-bold mt-1 ${isZero ? "text-slate-400" : isGood ? "text-emerald-500" : "text-rose-500"}`}
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                    >
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      {isZero ? (
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                        <Minus size={8} />
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      ) : diff > 0 ? (
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                        <ArrowUpRight size={8} />
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      ) : (
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                        <ArrowDownRight size={8} />
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      )}
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      {Math.abs(diff).toFixed(1)}%
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                    </div>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                  );
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                }
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                              }
components/ComparisonView.tsx:
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                              return (

components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                >

components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                    <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1">
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      <span
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                        className={`text-[11px] font-mono font-bold ${isBest && !baselineId ? "text-sky-700 dark:text-sky-400" : "text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300"}`}

components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                        {prop?.value ?? "-"}
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      </span>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      {prop?.unit && (
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                        <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-slate-400">

components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                        </span>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                      )}
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                    </div>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                    {diffDisplay}
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                  </div>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                                </td>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                              );
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                            })}
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                          </motion.tr>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                        ))}
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                      </React.Fragment>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                    ))}
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                  </tbody>
components/ComparisonView.tsx:                </table>

components/AddProductModal.tsx:export const AddProductModal: React.FC<AddProductModalProps> = ({

components/AddProductModal.tsx:  const { t } = useLanguage();
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<Partial<Product>>({
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    gradeName: "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    manufacturer: "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    categoryIds: [],
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  });
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  const [propertyRows, setPropertyRows] = useState<PropertyRow[]>([]);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  const [isAiGenerating, setIsAiGenerating] = useState(false);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  const handleAiFill = async () => {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    if (!formData.gradeName || isAiGenerating) return;
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    setIsAiGenerating(true);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    try {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      const generated = await aiService.generateProductProperties(
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        formData.gradeName,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        formData.manufacturer || ""
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      );
components/AddProductModal.tsx:
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      const newRows: PropertyRow[] = Object.entries(generated).map(([key, val]) => ({
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        id: `ai-${Date.now()}-${key}`,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        key,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        value: String(val.value),
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        unit: val.unit || "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        standard: val.standard || "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        instrument: val.instrument || "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        temperature: val.temperature || "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        referenceId: val.referenceId || "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        sourceUrl: val.sourceUrl || "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        isExpanded: false,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      }));
components/AddProductModal.tsx:
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      setPropertyRows(prev => [...newRows, ...prev]);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    } catch (error) {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      console.error("AI Generation failed:", error);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    } finally {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      setIsAiGenerating(false);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    }
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  };
components/AddProductModal.tsx:
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  const handleSave = async () => {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    if (isSaving || !formData.gradeName) return;

components/AddProductModal.tsx:
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    const newProperties: Record<string, PropertyValue> = {};

components/AddProductModal.tsx:      if (row.key.trim()) {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        const numVal = Number(row.value);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        newProperties[row.key] = {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:          value: !isNaN(numVal) && row.value.trim() !== "" ? numVal : row.value,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:          unit: row.unit.trim() || undefined,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:          standard: row.standard.trim() || undefined,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:          instrument: row.instrument.trim() || undefined,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:          temperature: row.temperature.trim() || undefined,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:          referenceId: row.referenceId.trim() || undefined,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:          sourceUrl: row.sourceUrl.trim() || undefined,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        };
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      }
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    });
components/AddProductModal.tsx:
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    const newProduct: Partial<Product> = {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      ...formData,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      properties: newProperties,
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    };
components/AddProductModal.tsx:
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    try {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      await onSave(newProduct);

components/AddProductModal.tsx:    } catch {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      // Error handling in parent
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    } finally {
components/AddProductModal.tsx:      setIsSaving(false);
components/AddProductModal.tsx:    }
components/AddProductModal.tsx:  };

components/AddProductModal.tsx:        key: "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        value: "",
components/AddProductModal.tsx:        unit: "",

components/ScientificChart.tsx:      if (!Array.isArray(radarSeries) || radarSeries.length === 0) return false;
components/ScientificChart.tsx:      return radarSeries.some(
components/ScientificChart.tsx:        (d: { value?: unknown[] }) =>

components/ScientificChart.tsx:          Array.isArray(d.value) &&
components/ScientificChart.tsx:          d.value.some(
components/ScientificChart.tsx:            (v: unknown) => v !== undefined && v !== null && !isNaN(Number(v)),
components/ScientificChart.tsx:          ),
components/ScientificChart.tsx:      );

components/ScientificChart.tsx:
components/ScientificChart.tsx:    if (type === "ashby" || type === "mfr_density") {

components/ScientificChart.tsx:      if (!series || series.length === 0) return false;
components/ScientificChart.tsx:      return series.some(

components/ScientificChart.tsx:          s.data && Array.isArray(s.data) && s.data.length > 0,

components/ScientificChart.tsx:          option = getMfrDensityChartOption(data, theme);
components/ScientificChart.tsx:          break;
components/ScientificChart.tsx:        case "parallel": {

components/ScientificChart.tsx:          if (!Array.isArray(data)) throw new Error("GPC data must be an array of products");

components/TreeSidebar.tsx:
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:  const filterCategories = useCallback(
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:    (cats: Category[], term: string): Category[] => {
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:      const filter = (categoriesToFilter: Category[]): Category[] => {
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:        return categoriesToFilter.reduce<Category[]>((acc, cat) => {
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:          const name = language === "en" && cat.nameEn ? cat.nameEn : cat.name;
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:          const matches = name.toLowerCase().includes(term.toLowerCase());
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:          let filteredChildren: Category[] = [];
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:          if (cat.children) {
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:            filteredChildren = filter(cat.children);
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:          }
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:          if (matches || filteredChildren.length > 0) {
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:            acc.push({ ...cat, children: filteredChildren });
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:          }
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:          return acc;
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:        }, []);
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:      };
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:      return filter(cats);
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:    },
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:    [language],
components/TreeSidebar.tsx:  );

components/DataGrid.tsx:        else widths[c.key] = 192;
components/DataGrid.tsx:      });
components/DataGrid.tsx:      return widths;
components/DataGrid.tsx:    }, [columns]);
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:    const { columnWidths, handleResize } = useColumnResizing(defaultWidths);
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:    const stickyOffsets = useMemo(() => {
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const offsets: Record<string, number> = {
components/DataGrid.tsx:        _checkbox: 0,
components/DataGrid.tsx:        _score: columnWidths["_checkbox"] || 48,
components/DataGrid.tsx:      };
components/DataGrid.tsx:      let currentOffset =
components/DataGrid.tsx:        (columnWidths["_checkbox"] || 48) + (columnWidths["_score"] || 80);

components/DataGrid.tsx:        }
components/DataGrid.tsx:      });
components/DataGrid.tsx:      return offsets;
components/DataGrid.tsx:    }, [visibleCols, columnWidths]);
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:    const columnExtremes = useMemo(() => {
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const extremes: Record<string, number> = {};
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const activeCols = visibleCols.filter((c) => !c.isSystem);
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const numCols = activeCols.length;
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const numData = currentViewData.length;
components/DataGrid.tsx:      if (numCols === 0 || numData === 0) return extremes;
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const colKeys = new Array(numCols);
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const colIsLowBest = new Array(numCols);
components/DataGrid.tsx:      for (let c = 0; c < numCols; c++) {
components/DataGrid.tsx:        colKeys[c] = activeCols[c].key;
components/DataGrid.tsx:        colIsLowBest[c] = isLowBest(colKeys[c]);
components/DataGrid.tsx:      }
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const minArr = new Float32Array(numCols).fill(Infinity);
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const maxArr = new Float32Array(numCols).fill(-Infinity);
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const hasDataArr = new Uint8Array(numCols);
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < numData; i++) {
components/DataGrid.tsx:        const props = currentViewData[i].properties;
components/DataGrid.tsx:        for (let c = 0; c < numCols; c++) {
components/DataGrid.tsx:          const rawVal = props[colKeys[c]]?.value;
components/DataGrid.tsx:          const val =
components/DataGrid.tsx:            typeof rawVal === "number" ? rawVal : parseFloat(String(rawVal));
components/DataGrid.tsx:          if (!isNaN(val)) {
components/DataGrid.tsx:            hasDataArr[c] = 1;
components/DataGrid.tsx:            if (val < minArr[c]) minArr[c] = val;
components/DataGrid.tsx:            if (val > maxArr[c]) maxArr[c] = val;
components/DataGrid.tsx:          }
components/DataGrid.tsx:        }
components/DataGrid.tsx:      }
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:      for (let c = 0; c < numCols; c++) {
components/DataGrid.tsx:        if (hasDataArr[c] === 1) {
components/DataGrid.tsx:          extremes[colKeys[c]] = colIsLowBest[c] ? minArr[c] : maxArr[c];
components/DataGrid.tsx:        }
components/DataGrid.tsx:      }
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:      return extremes;
components/DataGrid.tsx:    }, [currentViewData, visibleCols]);
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
components/DataGrid.tsx:      const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
components/DataGrid.tsx:        if (contextMenu) return;
components/DataGrid.tsx:
components/DataGrid.tsx:        if (e.key === "ArrowDown") {
components/DataGrid.tsx:          e.preventDefault();
components/DataGrid.tsx:          setFocusedIndex((prev) => {
components/DataGrid.tsx:            const next = Math.min(prev + 1, currentViewData.length - 1);
components/DataGrid.tsx:            rowVirtualizer.scrollToIndex(next, { align: "auto" });
components/DataGrid.tsx:            return next;
components/DataGrid.tsx:          });
components/DataGrid.tsx:        } else if (e.key === "ArrowUp") {
components/DataGrid.tsx:          e.preventDefault();
components/DataGrid.tsx:          setFocusedIndex((prev) => {
components/DataGrid.tsx:            const next = Math.max(prev - 1, 0);
components/DataGrid.tsx:            rowVirtualizer.scrollToIndex(next, { align: "auto" });
components/DataGrid.tsx:            return next;
components/DataGrid.tsx:          });
components/DataGrid.tsx:        } else if (e.key === "Enter" && focusedIndex >= 0) {
components/DataGrid.tsx:          onViewDetails(currentViewData[focusedIndex]);
components/DataGrid.tsx:        } else if (e.key === " " && focusedIndex >= 0) {
components/DataGrid.tsx:          e.preventDefault();
components/DataGrid.tsx:          toggleSelection(currentViewData[focusedIndex].id);
components/DataGrid.tsx:        } else if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === "a") {
components/DataGrid.tsx:          // Only select all if grid is likely the focus target or active element is body/grid
components/DataGrid.tsx:          if (
components/DataGrid.tsx:            document.activeElement?.tagName === "BODY" ||
components/DataGrid.tsx:            document.activeElement?.closest(".group\\/grid")

components/DataGrid.tsx:            e.preventDefault();
components/DataGrid.tsx:            handleToggleAllSelection();
components/DataGrid.tsx:          }
components/DataGrid.tsx:        } else if (e.key === "Delete" || e.key === "Backspace") {
components/DataGrid.tsx:          // Delete focused item if not in input
components/DataGrid.tsx:          const target = e.target as HTMLElement;
components/DataGrid.tsx:          if (
components/DataGrid.tsx:            target.tagName !== "INPUT" &&
components/DataGrid.tsx:            target.tagName !== "TEXTAREA" &&

components/DataGrid.tsx:          }
components/DataGrid.tsx:        }
components/DataGrid.tsx:      };
components/DataGrid.tsx:      window.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
components/DataGrid.tsx:      return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);

components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:import React, { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:import { Product } from '../types';
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:import ReactECharts from "echarts-for-react";
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:interface DegradationSimulatorProps {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  product: Product;
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:}
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:export const DegradationSimulator: React.FC<DegradationSimulatorProps> = ({ product }) => {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  const [temperature, setTemperature] = useState(80); // Default 80C
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  const [years, setYears] = useState(10); // Default 10 years
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  // Simple Mock Arrhenius Model
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  // P(t) = P_0 * exp(-k * t)
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  // k(T) = A * exp(-E_a / (R * T))
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  // T in Kelvin
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:  const options = useMemo(() => {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    // Generate data points
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const timePoints = [];
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const meanValues = [];
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const upperConfidence = [];
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const lowerConfidence = [];
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    // Heuristics based on material
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const baseP0 = parseFloat(String(product.properties["拉伸强度"]?.value)) || 50; // default 50 MPa
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const RTi = parseFloat(String(product.properties["热变形温度"]?.value)) || 100; // default 100 C
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    // Pseudo activation energy and pre-exponential factor based on thermal resistance
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const Ea = 80000 + (RTi * 100); // J/mol
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const R = 8.314;
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const A = 1e12; 
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    // T = Temp + 273.15
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const T = temperature + 273.15;
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    const k = A * Math.exp(-Ea / (R * T));
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i <= years * 12; i++) {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        const t = i / 12; // years
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        timePoints.push(t.toFixed(1));
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        // base degradation
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        const degraded = baseP0 * Math.exp(-k * t * 8760); // approx hours
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        meanValues.push(degraded);
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        // mock 95% confidence bounds (gaussian process regression vibe)
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        const uncertainty = degraded * (0.05 * t);
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        upperConfidence.push(degraded + uncertainty);
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        lowerConfidence.push(Math.max(0, degraded - uncertainty));
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    }
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    return {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      title: {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        text: 'Arrhenius Degradation (Strength MPa)',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        textStyle: { fontSize: 12, color: '#64748b', fontWeight: 'normal' },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        left: 'center'
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      tooltip: {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        trigger: 'axis'
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      grid: { left: 40, right: 20, bottom: 30, top: 40 },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      xAxis: {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        type: 'category',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        boundaryGap: false,
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        data: timePoints,
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        name: 'Years',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        nameLocation: 'middle',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        nameGap: 20
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      yAxis: {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        type: 'value',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        name: 'Retention',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        min: 0,
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      series: [
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            name: 'Upper 95% CI',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            type: 'line',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            data: upperConfidence,
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            lineStyle: { opacity: 0 },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            symbol: 'none'
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            name: 'Lower 95% CI',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            type: 'line',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            data: lowerConfidence,
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            lineStyle: { opacity: 0 },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            areaStyle: {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:                color: 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.2)', // light blue
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            stack: 'confidence',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            symbol: 'none'
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        },
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        {
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            name: 'Expected Retention',
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:            type: 'line',

components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:        }
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:      ]
components/DegradationSimulator.tsx:    };

components/ToastContainer.tsx:interface Toast {
components/ToastContainer.tsx:  id: string;

components/ToastContainer.tsx:  type: "success" | "error" | "info";
components/ToastContainer.tsx:}
components/ToastContainer.tsx:
components/ToastContainer.tsx:interface ToastContainerProps {
components/ToastContainer.tsx:  toasts: Toast[];

components/ToastContainer.tsx:
components/ToastContainer.tsx:export const ToastContainer: React.FC<ToastContainerProps> = ({
components/ToastContainer.tsx:  toasts,
components/ToastContainer.tsx:  onRemove,
components/ToastContainer.tsx:}) => (
components/ToastContainer.tsx:  <div className="fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-[300] flex flex-col gap-3 pointer-events-none">
components/ToastContainer.tsx:    <AnimatePresence>
components/ToastContainer.tsx:      {toasts.map((toast) => (
components/ToastContainer.tsx:        <motion.div
components/ToastContainer.tsx:          initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 50, scale: 0.9 }}
components/ToastContainer.tsx:          animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0, scale: 1 }}
components/ToastContainer.tsx:          exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, transition: { duration: 0.2 } }}
components/ToastContainer.tsx:          className="pointer-events-auto"
components/ToastContainer.tsx:        >
components/ToastContainer.tsx:          <div
components/ToastContainer.tsx:            className={`flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border ${
components/ToastContainer.tsx:              toast.type === "success"
components/ToastContainer.tsx:                ? "bg-emerald-500 border-emerald-400 text-white"
components/ToastContainer.tsx:                : toast.type === "error"
components/ToastContainer.tsx:                  ? "bg-rose-500 border-rose-400 text-white"
components/ToastContainer.tsx:                  : "bg-slate-900 border-slate-800 text-white"
components/ToastContainer.tsx:            }`}
components/ToastContainer.tsx:          >
components/ToastContainer.tsx:            {toast.type === "success" ? (
components/ToastContainer.tsx:              <CheckCircle size={20} />
components/ToastContainer.tsx:            ) : toast.type === "error" ? (

components/EditProductModal.tsx:interface PropertyRow {

components/EditProductModal.tsx:  key: string;
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  value: string;

components/EditProductModal.tsx:export const EditProductModal: React.FC<EditProductModalProps> = ({

components/EditProductModal.tsx:  onClose,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  onSave,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  product,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:}) => {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const { t } = useLanguage();
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<Partial<Product>>({});
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const [propertyRows, setPropertyRows] = useState<PropertyRow[]>([]);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const [isAiGenerating, setIsAiGenerating] = useState(false);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const [errors, setErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const validate = () => {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    const newErrors: Record<string, string> = {};
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    if (!formData.gradeName?.trim()) newErrors.gradeName = t("fieldRequired", "Field required");
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    if (!formData.manufacturer?.trim()) newErrors.manufacturer = t("fieldRequired", "Field required");
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    // Check for duplicate property keys
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    const seenKeys = new Set<string>();
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    propertyRows.forEach(row => {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      if (row.key.trim()) {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        if (seenKeys.has(row.key.trim())) {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          newErrors[`prop-${row.id}`] = t("duplicateKey", "Duplicate key");
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        }
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        seenKeys.add(row.key.trim());
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      }
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    });
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    setErrors(newErrors);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  };
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const handleAiFill = async () => {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    if (!formData.gradeName || isAiGenerating) return;
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    setIsAiGenerating(true);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    try {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      const generated = await aiService.generateProductProperties(
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        formData.gradeName,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        formData.manufacturer || ""
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      );
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      const newRows: PropertyRow[] = Object.entries(generated).map(([key, val]) => ({
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        id: `ai-${Date.now()}-${key}`,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        key,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        value: String(val.value),
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        unit: val.unit || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        standard: val.standard || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        instrument: val.instrument || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        temperature: val.temperature || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        referenceId: val.referenceId || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        sourceUrl: val.sourceUrl || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        isExpanded: false,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      }));
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      // Merge behavior: avoid duplicates or just append? Append is safer for users to review.
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      setPropertyRows(prev => [...newRows, ...prev]);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    } catch (error) {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      console.error("AI Generation failed:", error);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    } finally {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      setIsAiGenerating(false);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    }
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  };
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

components/EditProductModal.tsx:        manufacturer: product.manufacturer,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        categoryIds: product.categoryIds,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      });
components/EditProductModal.tsx:

components/EditProductModal.tsx:        const val = v as PropertyValue; // Explicit Cast
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        return {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          id: `prop-${index}-${Date.now()}`,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          key,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          value: String(val.value),
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          unit: val.unit || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          standard: val.standard || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          instrument: val.instrument || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          temperature: val.temperature || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          referenceId: val.referenceId || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          sourceUrl: val.sourceUrl || "",
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          isExpanded: false,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        };
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      });
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      setPropertyRows(rows);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    }
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  }, [product, isOpen]);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:  const handleSave = async () => {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    if (!product || isSaving) return;
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    if (!validate()) return;
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    setIsSaving(true);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    const newProperties: Record<string, PropertyValue> = {};
components/EditProductModal.tsx:    propertyRows.forEach((row) => {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:      if (row.key.trim()) {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        const numVal = Number(row.value);
components/EditProductModal.tsx:        newProperties[row.key] = {
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          value: !isNaN(numVal) && row.value.trim() !== "" ? numVal : row.value,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          unit: row.unit.trim() || undefined,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          standard: row.standard.trim() || undefined,
components/EditProductModal.tsx:          instrument: row.instrument.trim() || undefined,

components/ColumnResizer.tsx:export const ColumnResizer: React.FC<ColumnResizerProps> = ({
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:  columnKey,
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:  width,
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:  onResize,
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:}) => {
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:  const [isResizing, setIsResizing] = useState(false);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:  const [dragOffset, setDragOffset] = useState(0);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:  const handleMouseDown = useCallback(
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      e.preventDefault();
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      e.stopPropagation();
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      setIsResizing(true);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      setDragOffset(0);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      const startX = e.pageX;
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      let currentDeltaX = 0;
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      let rafId: number;
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      const handleMouseMove = (moveEvent: MouseEvent) => {
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        if (rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        rafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:          currentDeltaX = moveEvent.pageX - startX;
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:          setDragOffset(currentDeltaX);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        });
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      };
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      const handleMouseUp = () => {
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        if (rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        setIsResizing(false);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        setDragOffset(0);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        document.removeEventListener("mousemove", handleMouseMove);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        document.removeEventListener("mouseup", handleMouseUp);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        // Only commit the heavy layout recalculation on drag completion
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        if (currentDeltaX !== 0) {
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:          onResize(columnKey, width + currentDeltaX);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        }
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      };
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      document.addEventListener("mousemove", handleMouseMove);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      document.addEventListener("mouseup", handleMouseUp);
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:    },
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:    [columnKey, width, onResize],
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:  );
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:  return (
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:    <motion.div
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      whileHover={{ backgroundColor: "rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.5)" }}
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      whileTap={{ scaleX: 2 }}
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      className={`absolute right-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-2 cursor-col-resize z-50 transition-colors ${isResizing ? "bg-primary-500" : "bg-transparent"}`}
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:    >
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:      <AnimatePresence>
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:        {isResizing && (
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:          <motion.div
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
components/ColumnResizer.tsx:            animate={{ opacity: 1, x: dragOffset }}

components/App.tsx:// --- ResizeObserver Error Suppression ---
components/App.tsx:// We suppress the Vite error overlay for ResizeObserver loop errors instead of patching ResizeObserver,
components/App.tsx:// because patching ResizeObserver with requestAnimationFrame breaks @tanstack/react-virtual synchronous layout during zoom/resize.
components/App.tsx:if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
components/App.tsx:  window.addEventListener("error", (e) => {
components/App.tsx:    if (
components/App.tsx:      e.message === "ResizeObserver loop limit exceeded" ||
components/App.tsx:      e.message ===
components/App.tsx:        "ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications."
components/App.tsx:    ) {
components/App.tsx:      // e.stopImmediatePropagation() sometimes doesn't stop Vite's overlay,
components/App.tsx:      // so we actively remove it if it pops up.
components/App.tsx:      const overlay = document.querySelector("vite-error-overlay");
components/App.tsx:      if (overlay) overlay.remove();
components/App.tsx:    }
components/App.tsx:  });
components/App.tsx:}
